name: 狂暴
desc: 在战斗中，你以原始的凶猛战斗。在你的回合，你可以使用附赠动作进入狂暴。狂暴期间，如果你没有穿戴重甲，你获得以下好处：
- 你在力量检定和力量豁免检定上具有优势。
- 当你使用力量进行近战武器攻击时，你的伤害骰获得+2加值。这个加值随着等级提升而增加。
- 你对钝击、穿刺和挥砍伤害具有抗性。
如果你能施放法术，你在狂暴期间不能施放法术或维持对法术的专注。
你的狂暴持续1分钟。如果你陷入昏迷，或者你的回合结束且你自上个回合以来没有攻击敌对生物或受到伤害，它会提前结束。你也可以在你的回合使用附赠动作结束狂暴。
一旦你在当前等级达到狂暴最大次数，你必须完成长休才能再次狂暴。你在1级时可以狂暴2次，3级时3次，6级时4次，12级时5次，17级时6次。
desc_en: In battle, you fight with primal ferocity. On your turn, you can enter a rage as a bonus action. While raging, you gain the following benefits if you aren't wearing heavy armor:
- You have advantage on Strength checks and Strength saving throws.
- When you make a melee weapon Attack using Strength, you gain a +2 bonus to the damage roll. This bonus increases as you level.
- You have Resistance to bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing damage.
If you are able to cast Spells, you can't cast them or concentrate on them while raging.

Your rage lasts for 1 minute. It ends early if you are knocked Unconscious or if Your Turn ends and you haven't attacked a hostile creature since your last turn or taken damage since then. You can also end your rage on Your Turn as a Bonus Action.

Once you have raged the maximum number of times for your barbarian level, you must finish a Long Rest before you can rage again. You may rage 2 times at 1st level, 3 at 3rd, 4 at 6th, 5 at 12th, and 6 at 17th.

name: 无甲防御
desc: 当你未穿戴任何护甲时，你的护甲等级等于10+你的敏捷调整值+你的体质调整值。你可以持握盾牌并仍然获得此好处。
desc_en: While you are not wearing any armor, your Armor Class equals 10 + your Dexterity modifier + your Constitution modifier. You can use a shield and still gain this benefit.

name: 鲁莽攻击
desc: 从2级开始，你可以抛开一切防御顾虑，以凶猛的绝望进行攻击。当你在回合中进行第一次攻击时，你可以决定进行鲁莽攻击。这样做让你在本回合使用力量进行的近战武器攻击检定具有优势，但对你的攻击检定也具有优势，直到你的下个回合。
desc_en: Starting at 2nd level, you can throw aside all concern for defense to attack with fierce desperation. When you make your first attack on your turn, you can decide to attack recklessly. Doing so gives you advantage on melee weapon attack rolls using Strength during this turn, but attack rolls against you have advantage until your next turn.

name: 危险感知
desc: 在2级时，你获得对附近事物不寻常的超自然感知，让你在躲避危险时占得先机。你在对抗你能看到的效果（如陷阱和法术）的敏捷豁免检定上具有优势。要获得此好处，你不能处于目盲、耳聋或失能状态。
desc_en: At 2nd level, you gain an uncanny sense of when things nearby aren't as they should be, giving you an edge when you dodge away from danger. You have advantage on Dexterity saving throws against effects that you can see, such as traps and spells. To gain this benefit, you can't be blinded, deafened, or incapacitated.

name: 原始道途
desc: 在3级时，你选择一条道路来塑造你狂暴的本质。选择狂战士道途或图腾战士道途，两者都在职业描述末尾详述。你的选择在3级以及6、10、14级时赋予你特性。
desc_en: At 3rd level, you choose a path that shapes the nature of your rage. Choose the Path of the Berserker or the Path of the Totem Warrior, both detailed at the end of the class description. Your choice grants you features at 3rd level and again at 6th, 10th, and 14th levels.

name: 狂热
desc: 从你在3级选择此道途开始，你可以在狂暴时进入狂热。如果你这样做，在你的狂暴持续期间，你可以在本回合之后的每个回合使用附赠动作进行一次单手近战武器攻击。当你的狂暴结束时，你遭受一级力竭（如附录A所述）。
desc_en: Starting when you choose this path at 3rd level, you can go into a frenzy when you rage. If you do so, for the duration of your rage you can make a single melee weapon attack as a bonus action on each of your turns after this one. When your rage ends, you suffer one level of exhaustion (as described in appendix A).

name: 属性值提升
desc: 当你达到4级，以及8、12、16、19级时，你可以将一项自选属性值提升2点，或者将两项自选属性值各提升1点。正常而言，你不能通过此特性将属性值提升到20以上。
desc_en: When you reach 4th level, and again at 8th, 12th, 16th, and 19th level, you can increase one ability score of your choice by 2, or you can increase two ability scores of your choice by 1. As normal, you can't increase an ability score above 20 using this feature.

name: 额外攻击
desc: 从5级开始，每当你在你的回合采取攻击动作时，你可以攻击两次而非一次。
desc_en: Beginning at 5th level, you can attack twice, instead of once, whenever you take the Attack action on your turn.

name: 快速移动
desc: 从5级开始，当你未穿戴重甲时，你的速度增加10尺。
desc_en: Starting at 5th level, your speed increases by 10 feet while you aren't wearing heavy armor.

name: 无心狂暴
desc: 从6级开始，你在狂暴期间不能被魅惑或恐惧。如果你在进入狂暴时已被魅惑或恐惧，该效果在狂暴持续期间被暂停。
desc_en: Beginning at 6th level, you can't be charmed or frightened while raging. If you are charmed or frightened when you enter your rage, the effect is suspended for the duration of the rage.

name: 道途特性
desc: 在3级时，你选择一条道路来塑造你狂暴的本质。选择狂战士道途或图腾战士道途，两者都在职业描述末尾详述。你的选择在3级以及6、10、14级时赋予你特性。
desc_en: At 3rd level, you choose a path that shapes the nature of your rage. Choose the Path of the Berserker or the Path of the Totem Warrior, both detailed at the end of the class description. Your choice grants you features at 3rd level and again at 6th, 10th, and 14th levels.

name: 野兽本能
desc: 到7级时，你的本能如此敏锐以至于你在先攻检定上具有优势。
此外，如果你在战斗开始时被突袭且没有失能，你可以在你的第一个回合正常行动，但前提是你必须在该回合做任何其他事情之前进入狂暴。
desc_en: By 7th level, your instincts are so honed that you have advantage on initiative rolls.

Additionally, if you are surprised at the beginning of combat and aren't incapacitated, you can act normally on your first turn, but only if you enter your rage before doing anything else on that turn.

name: 属性值提升
desc: 当你达到4级，以及8、12、16、19级时，你可以将一项自选属性值提升2点，或者将两项自选属性值各提升1点。正常而言，你不能通过此特性将属性值提升到20以上。
desc_en: When you reach 4th level, and again at 8th, 12th, 16th, and 19th level, you can increase one ability score of your choice by 2, or you can increase two ability scores of your choice by 1. As normal, you can't increase an ability score above 20 using this feature.

name: 凶恶暴击（1骰）
desc: 从9级开始，当你用近战攻击造成重击时，你可以额外掷一枚武器伤害骰来决定额外伤害。这在13级时增加到两枚额外骰，在17级时增加到三枚额外骰。
desc_en: Beginning at 9th level, you can roll one additional weapon damage die when determining the extra damage for a critical hit with a melee attack. This increases to two additional dice at 13th level and three additional dice at 17th level.

name: 威吓气场
desc: 从10级开始，你可以使用动作以你威胁性的存在来恐吓某人。当你这样做时，选择30尺内你能看到的一个生物。如果该生物能看到或听到你，它必须成功通过感知豁免检定（DC等于8+你的熟练加值+你的魅力调整值），否则对你恐惧，直到你的下个回合结束。在随后的回合，你可以使用动作延长受恐惧生物的此效果持续时间，直到你的下个回合结束。如果该生物在其回合结束时脱离视线或距离你超过60尺，此效果结束。
如果该生物成功通过豁免检定，你在24小时内不能对该生物使用此特性。
desc_en: Beginning at 10th level, you can use your action to frighten someone with your menacing presence. When you do so, choose one creature that you can see within 30 feet of you. If the creature can see or hear you, it must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw (DC equal to 8 + your proficiency bonus + your Charisma modifier) or be frightened of you until the end of your next turn. On subsequent turns, you can use your action to extend the duration of this effect on the frightened creature until the end of your next turn. This effect ends if the creature ends its turn out of line of sight or more than 60 feet away from you.
If the creature succeeds on its saving throw, you can't use this feature on that creature again for 24 hours.

name: 道途特性
desc: 在3级时，你选择一条道路来塑造你狂暴的本质。选择狂战士道途或图腾战士道途，两者都在职业描述末尾详述。你的选择在3级以及6、10、14级时赋予你特性。
desc_en: At 3rd level, you choose a path that shapes the nature of your rage. Choose the Path of the Berserker or the Path of the Totem Warrior, both detailed at the end of the class description. Your choice grants you features at 3rd level and again at 6th, 10th, and 14th levels.

name: 不屈狂暴
desc: 从11级开始，你的狂暴可以让你在遭受重伤时继续战斗。如果你在狂暴时降至0生命值且没有直接死亡，你可以进行DC10的体质豁免检定。如果你成功，你改为降至1生命值。
在你第一次使用此特性后，每次使用此特性DC增加5。当你完成短休或长休时，DC重置为10。
desc_en: Starting at 11th level, your rage can keep you fighting despite grievous wounds. If you drop to 0 hit points while you're raging and don't die outright, you can make a DC 10 Constitution saving throw. If you succeed, you drop to 1 hit point instead.
Each time you use this feature after the first, the DC increases by 5. When you finish a short or long rest, the DC resets to 10.

name: 属性值提升
desc: 当你达到4级，以及8、12、16、19级时，你可以将一项自选属性值提升2点，或者将两项自选属性值各提升1点。正常而言，你不能通过此特性将属性值提升到20以上。
desc_en: When you reach 4th level, and again at 8th, 12th, 16th, and 19th level, you can increase one ability score of your choice by 2, or you can increase two ability scores of your choice by 1. As normal, you can't increase an ability score above 20 using this feature.

name: 凶恶暴击（2骰）
desc: 从9级开始，当你用近战攻击造成重击时，你可以额外掷一枚武器伤害骰来决定额外伤害。这在13级时增加到两枚额外骰，在17级时增加到三枚额外骰。
desc_en: Beginning at 9th level, you can roll one additional weapon damage die when determining the extra damage for a critical hit with a melee attack. This increases to two additional dice at 13th level and three additional dice at 17th level.

name: 反击
desc: 从14级开始，当你受到5尺内生物的伤害时，你可以使用反应对该生物进行单手近战武器攻击。
desc_en: Starting at 14th level, when you take damage from a creature that is within 5 feet of you, you can use your reaction to make a melee weapon Attack against that creature.

name: 道途特性
desc: 在3级时，你选择一条道路来塑造你狂暴的本质。选择狂战士道途或图腾战士道途，两者都在职业描述末尾详述。你的选择在3级以及6、10、14级时赋予你特性。
desc_en: At 3rd level, you choose a path that shapes the nature of your rage. Choose the Path of the Berserker or the Path of the Totem Warrior, both detailed at the end of the class description. Your choice grants you features at 3rd level and again at 6th, 10th, and 14th levels.

name: 不息狂暴
desc: 从15级开始，你的狂暴如此凶猛，以至于只有在你陷入昏迷或你选择结束时才会提前结束。
desc_en: Beginning at 15th level, your rage is so fierce that it ends early only if you fall unconscious or if you choose to end it.

name: 属性值提升
desc: 当你达到4级，以及8、12、16、19级时，你可以将一项自选属性值提升2点，或者将两项自选属性值各提升1点。正常而言，你不能通过此特性将属性值提升到20以上。
desc_en: When you reach 4th level, and again at 8th, 12th, 16th, and 19th level, you can increase one ability score of your choice by 2, or you can increase two ability scores of your choice by 1. As normal, you can't increase an ability score above 20 using this feature.

name: 凶恶暴击（3骰）
desc: 从9级开始，当你用近战攻击造成重击时，你可以额外掷一枚武器伤害骰来决定额外伤害。这在13级时增加到两枚额外骰，在17级时增加到三枚额外骰。
desc_en: Beginning at 9th level, you can roll one additional weapon damage die when determining the extra damage for a critical hit with a melee attack. This increases to two additional dice at 13th level and three additional dice at 17th level.

name: 不屈威能
desc: 从18级开始，如果你的力量检定总值小于你的力量值，你可以使用该数值代替总值。
desc_en: Beginning at 18th level, if your total for a Strength check is less than your Strength score, you can use that score in place of the total.

name: 属性值提升
desc: 当你达到4级，以及8、12、16、19级时，你可以将一项自选属性值提升2点，或者将两项自选属性值各提升1点。正常而言，你不能通过此特性将属性值提升到20以上。
desc_en: When you reach 4th level, and again at 8th, 12th, 16th, and 19th level, you can increase one ability score of your choice by 2, or you can increase two ability scores of your choice by 1. As normal, you can't increase an ability score above 20 using this feature.

name: 原始勇者
desc: 在20级时，你体现了荒野的力量。你的力量和体质值各增加4。这些值的最大值现在为24。
desc_en: At 20th level, you embody the power of the wilds. Your Strength and Constitution scores increase by 4. Your maximum for those scores is now 24.

name: 施法：吟游诗人
desc: 你已经学会解开并重塑现实的结构，以配合你的愿望和音乐。你的法术是你庞大曲库的一部分，是你可以根据不同情况调节的魔法。
desc_en: You have learned to untangle and reshape the fabric of reality in harmony with your wishes and music. Your spells are part of your vast repertoire, magic that you can tune to different situations.

name: 吟游激励（d6）
desc: 你可以通过激昂的言语或音乐来激励他人。为此，你在你的回合使用附赠动作选择60尺内你能听到你的一个非自身生物。该生物获得一枚吟游诗人激励骰，一枚d6。在接下来的10分钟内的一次，该生物可以掷这枚骰子并将掷出的数字加到它进行的一项属性检定、攻击检定或豁免检定上。该生物可以等到掷完d20后再决定是否使用吟游诗人激励骰，但必须在DM宣布检定成功与否之前决定。一旦吟游诗人激励骰被掷出，它就消失了。一个生物一次只能拥有一枚吟游诗人激励骰。
你可以使用此特性的次数等于你的魅力调整值（至少一次）。当你完成长休时，你恢复所有已消耗的使用次数。
你的吟游诗人激励骰在你达到此职业的特定等级时发生变化。骰子在5级时变为d8，10级时变为d10，15级时变为d12。
desc_en: You can inspire others through stirring words or music. To do so, you use a bonus action on your turn to choose one creature other than yourself within 60 feet of you who can hear you. That creature gains one Bardic Inspiration die, a d6. Once within the next 10 minutes, the creature can roll the die and add the number rolled to one ability check, attack roll, or saving throw it makes. The creature can wait until after it rolls the d20 before deciding to use the Bardic Inspiration die, but must decide before the GM says whether the roll succeeds or fails. Once the Bardic Inspiration die is rolled, it is lost. A creature can have only one Bardic Inspiration die at a time.
You can use this feature a number of times equal to your Charisma modifier (a minimum of once). You regain any expended uses when you finish a long rest.
Your Bardic Inspiration die changes when you reach certain levels in this class. The die becomes a d8 at 5th level, a d10 at 10th level, and a d12 at 15th level.

name: 万事通
desc: 从2级开始，你可以将一半的熟练加值（向下取整）加到任何不包含你熟练加值的属性检定上。
desc_en: Starting at 2nd level, you can add half your proficiency bonus, rounded down, to any ability check you make that doesn't already include your proficiency bonus.

name: 休憩曲（d6）
desc: 从2级开始，你可以使用舒缓的音乐或演讲来帮助在短休期间恢复受伤的盟友。如果你或任何能听到你表演的友方生物在短休结束时通过花费一个或多个生命骰恢复生命值，这些生物每个额外恢复1d6生命值。
额外生命值在你达到此职业的特定等级时增加：9级时为1d8，13级时为1d10，17级时为1d12。
desc_en: Beginning at 2nd level, you can use soothing music or oration to help revitalize your wounded allies during a short rest. If you or any friendly creatures who can hear your performance regain hit points at the end of the short rest by spending one or more Hit Dice, each of those creatures regains an extra 1d6 hit points.
The extra hit points increase when you reach certain levels in this class: to 1d8 at 9th level, to 1d10 at 13th level, and to 1d12 at 17th level.

name: 吟游诗人学院
desc: 在3级时，你深入研究你所选择的吟游诗人学院的高级技巧，例如知识学院。你的选择在3级以及6和14级时赋予你特性。
desc_en: At 3rd level, you delve into the advanced techniques of a bard college of your choice, such as the College of Lore. Your choice grants you features at 3rd level and again at 6th and 14th level.

name: 额外熟练
desc: 当你在3级加入知识学院时，你获得三项自选技能的熟练。
desc_en: When you join the College of Lore at 3rd level, you gain proficiency with three skills of your choice.

name: 尖刻言语
desc: 同样在3级时，你学会如何使用你的机智来分散注意力、混淆视听，或以其他方式削弱他人的信心和能力。
当你能看到的一个生物在60尺内进行攻击检定、属性检定或伤害检定时，你可以使用反应消耗一次吟游诗人激励的使用次数，掷一枚吟游诗人激励骰并从该生物的检定中减去掷出的数字。
你可以在该生物掷完后选择使用此特性，但在DM确定攻击检定或属性检定是否成功或失败之前，或在该生物造成伤害之前。如果该生物听不到你或免疫魅惑，则它免疫此特性。
desc_en: Also at 3rd level, you learn how to use your wit to distract, confuse, and otherwise sap the confidence and competence of others.

When a creature that you can see within 60 feet of you makes an attack roll, an ability check, or a damage roll, you can use your reaction to expend one of your uses of Bardic Inspiration, rolling a Bardic Inspiration die and subtracting the number rolled from the creature's roll.

You can choose to use this feature after the creature makes its roll, but before the GM determines whether the attack roll or ability check succeeds or fails, or before the creature deals its damage. The creature is immune if it can't hear you or if it's immune to being charmed.

name: 专精
desc: 在3级时，选择你的两项技能熟练。对于任何使用所选熟练的属性检定，你的熟练加值翻倍。在10级时，你可以再选择两项技能熟练获得此好处。
desc_en: At 3rd level, choose two of your skill proficiencies. Your proficiency bonus is doubled for any ability check you make that uses either of the chosen proficiencies. At 10th level, you can choose another two skill proficiencies to gain this benefit.

name: 属性值提升
desc: 当你达到4级，以及8、12、16、19级时，你可以将一项自选属性值提升2点，或者将两项自选属性值各提升1点。正常而言，你不能通过此特性将属性值提升到20以上。
desc_en: When you reach 4th level, and again at 8th, 12th, 16th, and 19th level, you can increase one ability score of your choice by 2, or you can increase two ability scores of your choice by 1. As normal, you can't increase an ability score above 20 using this feature.

name: 吟游激励（d8）
desc: 你可以通过激昂的言语或音乐来激励他人。为此，你在你的回合使用附赠动作选择60尺内你能听到你的一个非自身生物。该生物获得一枚吟游诗人激励骰，一枚d6。在接下来的10分钟内的一次，该生物可以掷这枚骰子并将掷出的数字加到它进行的一项属性检定、攻击检定或豁免检定上。该生物可以等到掷完d20后再决定是否使用吟游诗人激励骰，但必须在DM宣布检定成功与否之前决定。一旦吟游诗人激励骰被掷出，它就消失了。一个生物一次只能拥有一枚吟游诗人激励骰。
你可以使用此特性的次数等于你的魅力调整值（至少一次）。当你完成长休时，你恢复所有已消耗的使用次数。
你的吟游诗人激励骰在你达到此职业的特定等级时发生变化。骰子在5级时变为d8，10级时变为d10，15级时变为d12。
desc_en: You can inspire others through stirring words or music. To do so, you use a bonus action on your turn to choose one creature other than yourself within 60 feet of you who can hear you. That creature gains one Bardic Inspiration die, a d6. Once within the next 10 minutes, the creature can roll the die and add the number rolled to one ability check, attack roll, or saving throw it makes. The creature can wait until after it rolls the d20 before deciding to use the Bardic Inspiration die, but must decide before the GM says whether the roll succeeds or fails. Once the Bardic Inspiration die is rolled, it is lost. A creature can have only one Bardic Inspiration die at a time.
You can use this feature a number of times equal to your Charisma modifier (a minimum of once). You regain any expended uses when you finish a long rest.
Your Bardic Inspiration die changes when you reach certain levels in this class. The die becomes a d8 at 5th level, a d10 at 10th level, and a d12 at 15th level.

name: 灵感之源
desc: 从5级开始，当你完成短休或长休时，你恢复所有已消耗的吟游诗人激励使用次数。
desc_en: Beginning when you reach 5th level, you regain all of your expended uses of Bardic Inspiration when you finish a short or long rest.

name: 反魅惑
desc: 在6级时，你获得使用音乐音符或力量之语来干扰影响心灵的效果的能力。作为一个动作，你可以开始一场持续到你的下个回合结束的表演。在此期间，你和30尺内的任何友方生物在对抗恐惧或魅惑的豁免检定上具有优势。一个生物必须能听到你才能获得此好处。如果你失能、被沉默或自愿结束（不需要动作），表演会提前结束。
desc_en: At 6th level, you gain the ability to use musical notes or words of power to disrupt mind-influencing effects. As an action, you can start a performance that lasts until the end of your next turn. During that time, you and any friendly creatures within 30 feet of you have advantage on saving throws against being frightened or charmed. A creature must be able to hear you to gain this benefit. The performance ends early if you are incapacitated or silenced or if you voluntarily end it (no action required).

name: 吟游诗人学院特性
desc: 在3级时，你深入研究你所选择的吟游诗人学院的高级技巧，例如知识学院。你的选择在3级以及6和14级时赋予你特性。
desc_en: At 3rd level, you delve into the advanced techniques of a bard college of your choice, such as the College of Lore. Your choice grants you features at 3rd level and again at 6th and 14th level.

name: 额外奥秘魔法
desc: 在6级时，你从任何职业学习两个自选的法术。你选择的法术必须是吟游诗人表格上显示你能施展的等级，或是戏法。所选法术对你而言视为吟游诗人法术，但不计入你所知吟游诗人法术的数量。
desc_en: At 6th level, you learn two spells of your choice from any class. A spell you choose must be of a level you can cast, as shown on the Bard table, or a cantrip. The chosen spells count as bard spells for you but don't count against the number of bard spells you know.

name: 属性值提升
desc: 当你达到4级，以及8、12、16、19级时，你可以将一项自选属性值提升2点，或者将两项自选属性值各提升1点。正常而言，你不能通过此特性将属性值提升到20以上。
desc_en: When you reach 4th level, and again at 8th, 12th, 16th, and 19th level, you can increase one ability score of your choice by 2, or you can increase two ability scores of your choice by 1. As normal, you can't increase an ability score above 20 using this feature.

name: 休憩曲（d8）
desc: 从2级开始，你可以使用舒缓的音乐或演讲来帮助在短休期间恢复受伤的盟友。如果你或任何能听到你表演的友方生物在短休结束时通过花费一个或多个生命骰恢复生命值，这些生物每个额外恢复1d6生命值。
额外生命值在你达到此职业的特定等级时增加：9级时为1d8，13级时为1d10，17级时为1d12。
desc_en: Beginning at 2nd level, you can use soothing music or oration to help revitalize your wounded allies during a short rest. If you or any friendly creatures who can hear your performance regain hit points at the end of the short rest by spending one or more Hit Dice, each of those creatures regains an extra 1d6 hit points.
The extra hit points increase when you reach certain levels in this class: to 1d8 at 9th level, to 1d10 at 13th level, and to 1d12 at 17th level.

name: 吟游激励（d10）
desc: 你可以通过激昂的言语或音乐来激励他人。为此，你在你的回合使用附赠动作选择60尺内你能听到你的一个非自身生物。该生物获得一枚吟游诗人激励骰，一枚d6。在接下来的10分钟内的一次，该生物可以掷这枚骰子并将掷出的数字加到它进行的一项属性检定、攻击检定或豁免检定上。该生物可以等到掷完d20后再决定是否使用吟游诗人激励骰，但必须在DM宣布检定成功与否之前决定。一旦吟游诗人激励骰被掷出，它就消失了。一个生物一次只能拥有一枚吟游诗人激励骰。
你可以使用此特性的次数等于你的魅力调整值（至少一次）。当你完成长休时，你恢复所有已消耗的使用次数。
你的吟游诗人激励骰在你达到此职业的特定等级时发生变化。骰子在5级时变为d8，10级时变为d10，15级时变为d12。
desc_en: You can inspire others through stirring words or music. To do so, you use a bonus action on your turn to choose one creature other than yourself within 60 feet of you who can hear you. That creature gains one Bardic Inspiration die, a d6. Once within the next 10 minutes, the creature can roll the die and add the number rolled to one ability check, attack roll, or saving throw it makes. The creature can wait until after it rolls the d20 before deciding to use the Bardic Inspiration die, but must decide before the GM says whether the roll succeeds or fails. Once the Bardic Inspiration die is rolled, it is lost. A creature can have only one Bardic Inspiration die at a time.
You can use this feature a number of times equal to your Charisma modifier (a minimum of once). You regain any expended uses when you finish a long rest.
Your Bardic Inspiration die changes when you reach certain levels in this class. The die becomes a d8 at 5th level, a d10 at 10th level, and a d12 at 15th level.

name: 专精
desc: 在3级时，选择你的两项技能熟练。对于任何使用所选熟练的属性检定，你的熟练加值翻倍。在10级时，你可以再选择两项技能熟练获得此好处。
desc_en: At 3rd level, choose two of your skill proficiencies. Your proficiency bonus is doubled for any ability check you make that uses either of the chosen proficiencies. At 10th level, you can choose another two skill proficiencies to gain this benefit.

name: 奥秘魔法
desc: 到10级时，你已经从广泛的学科中掠夺了魔法知识。从任何职业（包括本职业）选择两个法术。你选择的法术必须是吟游诗人表格上显示你能施展的等级，或是戏法。
所选法术对你而言视为吟游诗人法术，并计入吟游诗人表格的已知法术数量中。
你在14级和18级时从任何职业各再学习两个额外法术。
desc_en: By 10th level, you have plundered magical knowledge from a wide spectrum of disciplines. Choose two spells from any class, including this one. A spell you choose must be of a level you can cast, as shown on the Bard table, or a cantrip.
The chosen spells count as bard spells for you and are included in the number in the Spells Known column of the Bard table.
You learn two additional spells from any class at 14th level and again at 18th level.

desc: 当你达到4级，以及8、12、16、19级时，你可以将一项自选属性值提升2点，或者将两项自选属性值各提升1点。正常而言，你不能通过此特性将属性值提升到20以上。
desc_en: When you reach 4th level, and again at 8th, 12th, 16th, and 19th level, you can increase one ability score of your choice by 2, or you can increase two ability scores of your choice by 1. As normal, you can't increase an ability score above 20 using this feature.

desc_en: At 3rd level, you delve into the advanced techniques of a bard college of your choice, such as the College of Lore. Your choice grants you features at 3rd level and again at 6th and 14th level.

name: 绝伦技艺
desc: 从14级开始，当你进行属性检定时，你可以消耗一次吟游诗人激励的使用次数。掷一枚吟游诗人激励骰并将掷出的数字加到你的属性检定上。你可以选择在属性检定掷骰后这样做，但在DM告诉你是否成功或失败之前。
desc_en: Starting at 14th level, when you make an ability check, you can expend one use of Bardic Inspiration. Roll a Bardic Inspiration die and add the number rolled to your ability check. You can choose to do so after you roll the die for the ability check, but before the GM tells you whether you succeed or fail.

desc_en: When you reach 4th level, and again at 8th, 12th, 16th, and 19th level, you can increase one ability score of your choice by 2, or you can increase two ability scores of your choice by 1. As normal, you can't increase an ability score above 20 using this feature.

name: 卓越灵感
desc: 在20级时，当你掷先攻且没有吟游诗人激励使用次数剩余时，你恢复一次使用次数。
desc_en: At 20th level, when you roll initiative and have no uses of Bardic Inspiration left, you regain one use.

name: 施法：牧师
desc: 作为神圣力量的导体，你可以施展牧师法术。
desc_en: As a conduit for divine power, you can cast cleric spells.

name: 神圣领域
desc: 选择一个与你神祇相关的领域，例如知识、生命、光明、自然、风暴、诡术或战争。只有生命领域在开放游戏许可SRD中有详细描述。其他领域在官方规则书或其他出版商的产品中有描述。
你的领域在1级选择时赋予你领域法术和其他特性。它还在2级获得引导神力特性时赋予你额外使用引导神力的方式，并在6、8、17级提供额外好处。
desc_en: Choose one domain related to your deity, such as Knowledge, Life, Light, Nature, Tempest, Trickery, or War. Only the Life domain is detailed in the Open Game Licensed SRD. Additional Domains are described in the official rulebooks or products from other publishers.

Your domain grants you domain spells and other features when you choose it at 1st level. It also grants you additional ways to use Channel Divinity when you gain that feature at 2nd level, and additional benefits at 6th, 8th, and 17th levels.

name: 领域法术
desc: 每个领域都有一个法术列表——它的领域法术——你在领域描述中注明的牧师等级获得。一旦你获得领域法术，你总是准备好它，它不计入你每天可以准备的法术数量。
如果你有一个不在牧师法术列表上的领域法术，该法术仍然是你的牧师法术。
desc_en: Each domain has a list of spells--its domain spells--that you gain at the cleric levels noted in the domain description. Once you gain a domain spell, you always have it prepared, and it doesn't count against the number of spells you can prepare each day.
If you have a domain spell that doesn't appear on the cleric spell list, the spell is nonetheless a cleric spell for you.

name: 额外熟练
desc: 当你在1级选择这个领域时，你获得重甲熟练。
desc_en: When you choose this domain at 1st level, you gain proficiency with heavy armor.

name: 生命门徒
desc: 同样从1级开始，你的治疗法术更加有效。每当你使用1环或更高等级的法术恢复生物的生命值时，该生物额外恢复2+法术等级的生命值。
desc_en: Also starting at 1st level, your healing spells are more effective. Whenever you use a spell of 1st level or higher to restore hit points to a creature, the creature regains additional hit points equal to 2 + the spell's level.

name: 引导神力（1次/短休）
desc: 在2级时，你获得直接从你的神祇引导神圣能量的能力，使用该能量来驱动魔法效果。你开始有两个这样的效果：驱散亡灵和你的领域决定的一个效果。有些领域随着你等级提升赋予你额外效果，如领域描述中所述。
当你使用引导神力时，你选择创造哪个效果。然后你必须完成短休或长休才能再次使用你的引导神力。
一些引导神力效果需要豁免检定。当你使用本职业的这种效果时，DC等于你的牧师法术豁免DC。
从6级开始，你可以在两次休息之间使用两次引导神力，从18级开始可以使用三次。当你完成短休或长休时，你恢复已消耗的使用次数。
desc_en: At 2nd level, you gain the ability to channel divine energy directly from your deity, using that energy to fuel magical effects. You start with two such effects: Turn Undead and an effect determined by your domain. Some domains grant you additional effects as you advance in levels, as noted in the domain description.
When you use your Channel Divinity, you choose which effect to create. You must then finish a short or long rest to use your Channel Divinity again.
Some Channel Divinity effects require saving throws. When you use such an effect from this class, the DC equals your cleric spell save DC.

Beginning at 6th level, you can use your Channel Divinity twice between rests, and beginning at 18th level, you can use it three times between rests. When you finish a short or long rest, you regain your expended uses.

name: 引导神力：驱散亡灵
desc: 作为一个动作，你展示你的圣徽并念诵谴责亡灵的祷言。30尺内每个能看到或听到你的不死生物必须进行感知豁免检定。如果生物未能通过豁免检定，它被驱散1分钟或直到它受到任何伤害。
被驱散的生物必须尽其所能远离你，且它不能自愿移动到距离你30尺内的空间。它也不能进行反应。对于它的动作，它只能使用疾行动作或试图逃离阻止它移动的效果。如果没有地方可移动，该生物可以使用闪避动作。
desc_en: As an action, you present your holy symbol and speak a prayer censuring the undead. Each undead that can see or hear you within 30 feet of you must make a Wisdom saving throw. If the creature fails its saving throw, it is turned for 1 minute or until it takes any damage.

A turned creature must spend its turns trying to move as far away from you as it can, and it can't willingly move to a space within 30 feet of you. It also can't take reactions. For its action, it can use only the Dash action or try to escape from an effect that prevents it from moving. If there's nowhere to move, the creature can use the Dodge action.

name: 神圣领域特性
desc: 选择一个与你神祇相关的领域，例如知识、生命、光明、自然、风暴、诡术或战争。只有生命领域在开放游戏许可SRD中有详细描述。其他领域在官方规则书或其他出版商的产品中有描述。
你的领域在1级选择时赋予你领域法术和其他特性。它还在2级获得引导神力特性时赋予你额外使用引导神力的方式，并在6、8、17级提供额外好处。
desc_en: Choose one domain related to your deity, such as Knowledge, Life, Light, Nature, Tempest, Trickery, or War. Only the Life domain is detailed in the Open Game Licensed SRD. Additional Domains are described in the official rulebooks or products from other publishers.

Your domain grants you domain spells and other features when you choose it at 1st level. It also grants you additional ways to use Channel Divinity when you gain that feature at 2nd level, and additional benefits at 6th, 8th, and 17th levels.

name: 引导神力：保全生命
desc: 从2级开始，你可以使用引导神力来治愈重伤者。
作为一个动作，你展示你的圣徽并唤起治疗能量，可以恢复五倍于你牧师等级的生命值。
选择30尺内的任何生物，在这些生物之间分配这些生命值。此特性可以将生物恢复到不超过其生命值上限的一半。你不能将此特性用于不死生物或构装生物。
desc_en: Starting at 2nd level, you can use your Channel Divinity to heal the badly injured.
As an action, you present your holy symbol and evoke healing energy that can restore a number of hit points equal to five times your cleric level.

Choose any creatures within 30 feet of you, and divide those hit points among them. This feature can restore a creature to no more than half of its hit point maximum. You can't use this feature on an undead or a construct.

name: 领域法术
desc: 每个领域都有一个法术列表——它的领域法术——你在领域描述中注明的牧师等级获得。一旦你获得领域法术，你总是准备好它，它不计入你每天可以准备的法术数量。
如果你有一个不在牧师法术列表上的领域法术，该法术仍然是你的牧师法术。
desc_en: Each domain has a list of spells--its domain spells--that you gain at the cleric levels noted in the domain description. Once you gain a domain spell, you always have it prepared, and it doesn't count against the number of spells you can prepare each day.
If you have a domain spell that doesn't appear on the cleric spell list, the spell is nonetheless a cleric spell for you.

name: 属性值提升
desc: 当你达到4级，以及8、12、16、19级时，你可以将一项自选属性值提升2点，或者将两项自选属性值各提升1点。正常而言，你不能通过此特性将属性值提升到20以上。
desc_en: When you reach 4th level, and again at 8th, 12th, 16th, and 19th level, you can increase one ability score of your choice by 2, or you can increase two ability scores of your choice by 1. As normal, you can't increase an ability score above 20 using this feature.

name: 领域法术
desc: 每个领域都有一个法术列表——它的领域法术——你在领域描述中注明的牧师等级获得。一旦你获得领域法术，你总是准备好它，它不计入你每天可以准备的法术数量。
如果你有一个不在牧师法术列表上的领域法术，该法术仍然是你的牧师法术。
desc_en: Each domain has a list of spells--its domain spells--that you gain at the cleric levels noted in the domain description. Once you gain a domain spell, you always have it prepared, and it doesn't count against the number of spells you can prepare each day.
If you have a domain spell that doesn't appear on the cleric spell list, the spell is nonetheless a cleric spell for you.

name: 摧毁亡灵（挑战等级1/2或更低）
desc: 从5级开始，当不死生物对你的驱散亡灵特性的豁免检定失败时，如果其挑战等级等于或低于特定阈值，该生物立即被摧毁。
desc_en: Starting at 5th level, when an undead fails its saving throw against your Turn Undead feature, the creature is instantly destroyed if its challenge rating is at or below a certain threshold.

name: 引导神力（2次/短休）
desc: 从6级开始，你可以在两次休息之间使用两次引导神力，从18级开始可以使用三次。当你完成短休或长休时，你恢复已消耗的使用次数。
desc_en: Beginning at 6th level, you can use your Channel Divinity twice between rests, and beginning at 18th level, you can use it three times between rests. When you finish a short or long rest, you regain your expended uses.

name: 神圣领域特性
desc: 选择一个与你神祇相关的领域，例如知识、生命、光明、自然、风暴、诡术或战争。只有生命领域在开放游戏许可SRD中有详细描述。其他领域在官方规则书或其他出版商的产品中有描述。
你的领域在1级选择时赋予你领域法术和其他特性。它还在2级获得引导神力特性时赋予你额外使用引导神力的方式，并在6、8、17级提供额外好处。
desc_en: Choose one domain related to your deity, such as Knowledge, Life, Light, Nature, Tempest, Trickery, or War. Only the Life domain is detailed in the Open Game Licensed SRD. Additional Domains are described in the official rulebooks or products from other publishers.

Your domain grants you domain spells and other features when you choose it at 1st level. It also grants you additional ways to use Channel Divinity when you gain that feature at 2nd level, and additional benefits at 6th, 8th, and 17th levels.

name: 受福医者
desc: 从6级开始，你施放在他人身上的治疗法术也会治疗你。当你施放1环或更高等级的法术恢复除你之外的生物生命值时，你恢复2+法术等级的生命值。
desc_en: Beginning at 6th level, the healing spells you cast on others heal you as well. When you cast a spell of 1st level or higher that restores hit points to a creature other than you, you regain hit points equal to 2 + the spell's level.

name: 领域法术
desc: 每个领域都有一个法术列表——它的领域法术——你在领域描述中注明的牧师等级获得。一旦你获得领域法术，你总是准备好它，它不计入你每天可以准备的法术数量。
如果你有一个不在牧师法术列表上的领域法术，该法术仍然是你的牧师法术。

name: 神圣打击
desc: 在8级时，你获得将神圣能量注入武器打击的能力。在你的每个回合一次，当你用武器攻击命中生物时，你可以让攻击对目标额外造成1d8光耀伤害。当你达到14级时，额外伤害增加到2d8。
desc_en: At 8th level, you gain the ability to infuse your weapon strikes with divine energy. Once on each of your turns when you hit a creature with a weapon attack, you can cause the attack to deal an extra 1d8 radiant damage to the target. When you reach 14th level, the extra damage increases to 2d8.

desc: 每个领域都有一个法术列表——它的领域法术——你在领域描述中注明的牧师等级获得。一旦你获得领域法术，你总是准备好它，它不计入你每天可以准备的法术数量。

name: 神圣干预
desc: 从10级开始，当你的需要很大时，你可以呼唤你的神祇代表你进行干预。
祈求神祇的帮助需要你使用动作。描述你寻求的援助，并掷百分骰。如果你掷出的数字等于或低于你的牧师等级，你的神祇进行干预。DM决定干预的性质；任何牧师法术或牧师领域法术的效果都是合适的。
如果你的神祇进行干预，你在7天内不能再次使用此特性。否则，你可以在完成长休后再次使用。
在20级时，你要求干预的呼唤自动成功，不需要掷骰。
desc_en: Beginning at 10th level, you can call on your deity to intervene on your behalf when your need is great.

Imploring your deity's aid requires you to use your action. Describe the assistance you seek, and roll percentile dice. If you roll a number equal to or lower than your cleric level, your deity intervenes. The GM chooses the nature of the intervention; the effect of any cleric spell or cleric domain spell would be appropriate.
If your deity intervenes, you can't use this feature again for 7 days. Otherwise, you can use it again after you finish a long rest.
At 20th level, your call for intervention succeeds automatically, no roll required.

name: 至高治疗
desc: 从17级开始，当你通常需要掷一个或多个骰子用法术恢复生命值时，你改为对每个骰子使用最大可能数值。例如，你改为恢复12点生命值，而不是为生物恢复2d6生命值。
desc_en: Starting at 17th level, when you would normally roll one or more dice to restore hit points with a spell, you instead use the highest number possible for each die. For example, instead of restoring 2d6 hit points to a creature, you restore 12.

name: 引导神力（3次/短休）
desc: 从6级开始，你可以在两次休息之间使用两次引导神力，从18级开始可以使用三次。当你完成短休或长休时，你恢复已消耗的使用次数。

name: 神圣干预改善
desc: 在20级时，你要求干预的呼唤自动成功，不需要掷骰。
desc_en: At 20th level, your call for intervention succeeds automatically, no roll required.

name: 施法：德鲁伊
desc: 你可以引导自然的神圣本质，施展法术来塑造这股本质以顺应你的意志。
desc_en: Drawing on the divine essence of nature itself, you can cast spells to shape that essence to your will.

name: 德鲁伊语
desc: 你懂得德鲁伊语，德鲁伊的秘密语言。你可以使用这门语言说话并留下隐藏信息。你和其他懂得这门语言的人会自动发现此类信息。其他人可以通过成功的DC 15感知（察觉）检定发现信息的存在，但无法在没有魔法的情况下解读它。
desc_en: You know Druidic, the secret language of druids. You can speak the language and use it to leave hidden messages. You and others who know this language automatically spot such a message. Others spot the message's presence with a successful DC 15 Wisdom (Perception) check but can't decipher it without magic.

name: 荒野形态（挑战等级1/4或更低，无飞行或游泳速度）
desc: 从2级开始，你可以使用动作魔法般地变身为一个你曾见过的野兽形态。你可以使用此特性两次。完成短休或长休后，你恢复已消耗的使用次数。
你的德鲁伊等级决定了你可以变身成什么野兽，如下方的野兽形态表所示。例如，在2级时，你可以变身为任何挑战等级为1/4或更低且没有飞行或游泳速度的野兽。
你可以保持野兽形态的小时数等于你的德鲁伊等级的一半（向下取整）。之后你会恢复为正常形态，除非你再消耗一次此特性的使用次数。你可以在你的回合使用附赠动作提前恢复为正常形态。如果你陷入昏迷、生命值降至0或死亡，你会自动恢复为正常形态。
当你变形时，适用以下规则：
- 你的游戏数据被野兽的数据所取代，但你保留你的阵营、个性以及智力、感知和魅力值。你还保留你所有的技能和豁免熟练项，并获得该生物的熟练项。如果该生物拥有与你相同的熟练项，且其数据块中的加值高于你的，则使用该生物的加值而非你的。如果该生物拥有任何传奇或巢穴动作，你无法使用它们。
- 当你变形时，你获得野兽的生命值和生命骰。当你恢复为正常形态时，你回到变形前的生命值数量。但是，如果你因为生命值降至0而恢复形态，任何超过的伤害会转移到你的正常形态。例如，如果你在动物形态下受到10点伤害而只剩下1点生命值，你恢复形态并受到9点伤害。只要超额伤害没有将你的正常形态生命值降至0，你就不会陷入昏迷。
- 你不能施法，你说话或使用需要手的动作的能力受限于你野兽形态的能力。然而，变形不会打断你已施放法术的专注，也不会阻止你执行法术动作，如你已施放的召雷术。
- 你保留来自你的职业、种族或其他来源的任何特性的好处，如果新形态在生理上能够使用它们。但是，你不能使用你的任何特殊感官，如黑暗视觉，除非你的新形态也拥有该感官。
- 你选择你的装备是掉落在你的空间地面上、融入你的新形态，还是被它穿戴。穿戴的装备正常运作，但DM会根据生物的形状和大小决定新形态穿戴某件装备是否实用。你的装备不会改变大小或形状来适应新形态，新形态无法穿戴的任何装备必须掉落到地面或融入其中。融入形态的装备在你离开该形态前没有效果。
name_en: Wild Shape (CR 1/4 or below, no flying or swim speed)
desc_en: Starting at 2nd level, you can use your action to magically assume the shape of a beast that you have seen before. You can use this feature twice. You regain expended uses when you finish a short or long rest.

Your druid level determines the beasts you can transform into, as shown in the Beast Shapes table. At 2nd level, for example, you can transform into any beast that has a challenge rating of 1/4 or lower that doesn't have a flying or swimming speed.

You can stay in a beast shape for a number of hours equal to half your druid level (rounded down). You then revert to your normal form unless you expend another use of this feature. You can revert to your normal form earlier by using a bonus action on your turn. You automatically revert if you fall unconscious, drop to 0 hit points, or die.
While you are transformed, the following rules apply:

- Your game statistics are replaced by the statistics of the beast, but you retain your alignment, personality, and Intelligence, Wisdom, and Charisma scores. You also retain all of your skill and saving throw proficiencies, in addition to gaining those of the creature. If the creature has the same proficiency as you and the bonus in its stat block is higher than yours, use the creature's bonus instead of yours. If the creature has any legendary or lair actions, you can't use them.

- When you transform, you assume the beast's hit points and Hit Dice. When you revert to your normal form, you return to the number of hit points you had before you transformed. However, if you revert as a result of dropping to 0 hit points, any excess damage carries over to your normal form. For example, if you take 10 damage in animal form and have only 1 hit point left, you revert and take 9 damage. As long as the excess damage doesn't reduce your normal form to 0 hit points, you aren't knocked unconscious.

- You can't cast spells, and your ability to speak or take any action that requires hands is limited to the capabilities of your beast form. Transforming doesn't break your concentration on a spell you've already cast, however, or prevent you from taking actions that are part of a spell, such as call lightning, that you've already cast.

- You retain the benefit of any features from your class, race, or other source and can use them if the new form is physically capable of doing so. However, you can't use any of your special senses, such as darkvision, unless your new form also has that sense.

- You choose whether your equipment falls to the ground in your space, merges into your new form, or is worn by it. Worn equipment functions as normal, but the GM decides whether it is practical for the new form to wear a piece of equipment, based on the creature's shape and size. Your equipment doesn't change size or shape to match the new form, and any equipment that the new form can't wear must either fall to the ground or merge with it. Equipment that merges with the form has no effect until you leave the form.

name: 德鲁伊结社
desc: 在2级时，你选择认同一个德鲁伊结社，如大地结社。你的选择在2级时赋予你特性，并在6级、10级和14级时再次赋予你特性。
desc_en: At 2nd level, you choose to identify with a circle of druids, such as the Circle of the Land. Your choice grants you features at 2nd level and again at 6th, 10th, and 14th level.

name: 大地结社
desc: 大地结社由守护古老知识和仪式的神秘主义者和贤者组成，通过庞大的口头传统传承这些知识。这些德鲁伊在神圣的树木圆环或立石中集会，用德鲁伊语低语原始的秘密。结社中最智慧的成员担任坚持古信仰的社群的首席祭司，并作为那些人民的统治者的顾问。作为这个结社的成员，你的魔法受到你接受结社神秘仪式启蒙的那片土地的影响。
desc_en: The Circle of the Land is made up of mystics and sages who safeguard ancient knowledge and rites through a vast oral tradition. These druids meet within sacred circles of trees or standing stones to whisper primal secrets in Druidic. The circle's wisest members preside as the chief priests of communities that hold to the Old Faith and serve as advisors to the rulers of those folk. As a member of this circle, your magic is influenced by the land where you were initiated into the circle's mysterious rites.

name: 大地结社：极地
desc: 大地结社由守护古老知识和仪式的神秘主义者和贤者组成，通过庞大的口头传统传承这些知识。这些德鲁伊在神圣的树木圆环或立石中集会，用德鲁伊语低语原始的秘密。结社中最智慧的成员担任坚持古信仰的社群的首席祭司，并作为那些人民的统治者的顾问。作为这个结社的成员，你的魔法受到你接受结社神秘仪式启蒙的那片土地的影响。

name: 大地结社：海岸
desc: 大地结社由守护古老知识和仪式的神秘主义者和贤者组成，通过庞大的口头传统传承这些知识。这些德鲁伊在神圣的树木圆环或立石中集会，用德鲁伊语低语原始的秘密。结社中最智慧的成员担任坚持古信仰的社群的首席祭司，并作为那些人民的统治者的顾问。作为这个结社的成员，你的魔法受到你接受结社神秘仪式启蒙的那片土地的影响。

These druids meet within sacred circles of trees or standing stones to whisper primal secrets in Druidic. The circle's wisest members preside as the chief priests of communities that hold to the Old Faith and serve as advisors to the rulers of those folk. name: 额外戏法
desc: 当你在2级选择此结社时，你学会一个额外的自选德鲁伊戏法。
desc_en: When you choose this circle at 2nd level, you learn one additional druid cantrip of your choice.

name: 自然恢复
desc: 从2级开始，你可以通过静坐冥想并与自然沟通来恢复部分魔法能量。在短休期间，你选择要恢复的已消耗法术位。法术位的总等级可以等于或低于你的德鲁伊等级的一半（向上取整），且没有法术位可以是6级或更高。完成长休前你不能再次使用此特性。
例如，当你是4级德鲁伊时，你可以恢复最多两个等级的法术位。你可以恢复一个2级法术位或两个1级法术位。
desc_en: Starting at 2nd level, you can regain some of your magical energy by sitting in meditation and communing with nature. During a short rest, you choose expended spell slots to recover. The spell slots can have a combined level that is equal to or less than half your druid level (rounded up), and none of the slots can be 6th level or higher. You can't use this feature again until you finish a long rest.
For example, when you are a 4th-level druid, you can recover up to two levels worth of spell slots. You can recover either a 2nd-level slot or two 1st-level slots.

name: 结社法术（1级）
desc: 你与土地的神秘联系赋予你施展某些法术的能力。在3级、5级、7级和9级时，你获得与你成为德鲁伊的那片土地相关的结社法术。
选择那片土地——极地、海岸、沙漠、森林、草原、山地或沼泽——并查阅相关的法术列表。
一旦你获得某个结社法术，你就始终准备有该法术，且它不计入你每天可准备的法术数量。如果你获得的法术不在德鲁伊法术列表上，该法术对你而言仍然是德鲁伊法术。
desc_en: Your mystical connection to the land infuses you with the ability to cast certain spells. At 3rd, 5th, 7th, and 9th level you gain access to circle spells connected to the land where you became a druid.
Choose that land--arctic, coast, desert, forest, grassland, mountain, or swamp--and consult the associated list of spells.

Once you gain access to a circle spell, you always have it prepared, and it doesn't count against the number of spells you can prepare each day. If you gain access to a spell that doesn't appear on the druid spell list, the spell is nonetheless a druid spell for you.

name: 荒野形态（挑战等级1/2或更低，无飞行速度）
desc: 从2级开始，你可以使用动作魔法般地变身为一个你曾见过的野兽形态。你可以使用此特性两次。完成短休或长休后，你恢复已消耗的使用次数。
你的德鲁伊等级决定了你可以变身成什么野兽，如下方的野兽形态表所示。在2级时，例如，你可以变身为任何挑战等级为1/4或更低且没有飞行或游泳速度的野兽。
你可以保持野兽形态的小时数等于你的德鲁伊等级的一半（向下取整）。之后你会恢复为正常形态，除非你再消耗一次此特性的使用次数。你可以在你的回合使用附赠动作提前恢复为正常形态。如果你陷入昏迷、生命值降至0或死亡，你会自动恢复为正常形态。
当你变形时，适用以下规则：
- 你的游戏数据被野兽的数据所取代，但你保留你的阵营、个性以及智力、感知和魅力值。你还保留你所有的技能和豁免熟练项，并获得该生物的熟练项。如果该生物拥有与你相同的熟练项，且其数据块中的加值高于你的，则使用该生物的加值而非你的。如果该生物拥有任何传奇或巢穴动作，你无法使用它们。
- 当你变形时，你获得野兽的生命值和生命骰。当你恢复为正常形态时，你回到变形前的生命值数量。但是，如果你因为生命值降至0而恢复形态，任何超过的伤害会转移到你的正常形态。例如，如果你在动物形态下受到10点伤害而只剩下1点生命值，你恢复形态并受到9点伤害。只要超额伤害没有将你的正常形态生命值降至0，你就不会陷入昏迷。
- 你不能施法，你说话或使用需要手的动作的能力受限于你野兽形态的能力。然而，变形不会打断你已施放法术的专注，也不会阻止你执行法术动作，如你已施放的召雷术。
- 你保留来自你的职业、种族或其他来源的任何特性的好处，如果新形态在生理上能够使用它们。但是，你不能使用你的任何特殊感官，如黑暗视觉，除非你的新形态也拥有该感官。
- 你选择你的装备是掉落在你的空间地面上、融入你的新形态，还是被它穿戴。穿戴的装备正常运作，但DM会根据生物的形状和大小决定新形态穿戴某件装备是否实用。你的装备不会改变大小或形状来适应新形态，新形态无法穿戴的任何装备必须掉落到地面或融入其中。融入形态的装备在你离开该形态前没有效果。
name_en: Wild Shape (CR 1/2 or below, no flying speed)
desc_en: Starting at 2nd level, you can use your action to magically assume the shape of a beast that you have seen before. You can use this feature twice. You regain expended uses when you finish a short or long rest.

Your druid level determines the beasts you can transform into, as shown in the Beast Shapes table. At 2nd level, for example, you can transform into any beast that has a challenge rating of 1/4 or lower that doesn't have a flying or swimming speed.

You can stay in a beast shape for a number of hours equal to half your druid level (rounded down). You then revert to your normal form unless you expend another use of this feature. You can revert to your normal form earlier by using a bonus action on your turn. You automatically revert if you fall unconscious, drop to 0 hit points, or die.
While you are transformed, the following rules apply:

- Your game statistics are replaced by the statistics of the beast, but you retain your alignment, personality, and Intelligence, Wisdom, and Charisma scores. You also retain all of your skill and saving throw proficiencies, in addition to gaining those of the creature. If the creature has the same proficiency as you and the bonus in its stat block is higher than yours, use the creature's bonus instead of yours. If the creature has any legendary or lair actions, you can't use them.

- When you transform, you assume the beast's hit points and Hit Dice. When you revert to your normal form, you return to the number of hit points you had before you transformed. However, if you revert as a result of dropping to 0 hit points, any excess damage carries over to your normal form. For example, if you take 10 damage in animal form and have only 1 hit point left, you revert and take 9 damage. As long as the excess damage doesn't reduce your normal form to 0 hit points, you aren't knocked unconscious.

- You can't cast spells, and your ability to speak or take any action that requires hands is limited to the capabilities of your beast form. Transforming doesn't break your concentration on a spell you've already cast, however, or prevent you from taking actions that are part of a spell, such as call lightning, that you've already cast.

- You retain the benefit of any features from your class, race, or other source and can use them if the new form is physically capable of doing so. However, you can't use any of your special senses, such as darkvision, unless your new form also has that sense.

- You choose whether your equipment falls to the ground in your space, merges into your new form, or is worn by it. Worn equipment functions as normal, but the GM decides whether it is practical for the new form to wear a piece of equipment, based on the creature's shape and size. Your equipment doesn't change size or shape to match the new form, and any equipment that the new form can't wear must either fall to the ground or merge with it. Equipment that merges with the form has no effect until you leave the form.

name: 属性值提升
desc: 当你达到4级、8级、12级、16级和19级时，你可以选择一个能力值提升2点，或选择两个能力值各提升1点。通常情况下，你不能使用此特性将能力值提升到20以上。
desc_en: When you reach 4th level, and again at 8th, 12th, 16th, and 19th level, you can increase one ability score of your choice by 2, or you can increase two ability scores of your choice by 1. As normal, you can't increase an ability score above 20 using this feature.

name: 德鲁伊结社特性
desc: 在2级时，你选择认同一个德鲁伊结社，如大地结社。你的选择在2级时赋予你特性，并在6级、10级和14级时再次赋予你特性。
desc_en: At 2nd level, you choose to identify with a circle of druids, such as the Circle of the Land. Your choice grants you features at 2nd level and again at 6th, 10th, and 14th level.

name: 大地行者
desc: 从6级开始，穿越非魔法困难地形不再额外消耗你的移动力。你还可以穿过非魔法植物而不被它们减慢速度，也不会受到它们荆棘、尖刺或类似危害的伤害。
此外，你在对抗被魔法创造或操控以阻碍移动的植物（如纠缠术创造的植物）的豁免检定上具有优势。
desc_en: Starting at 6th level, moving through nonmagical difficult terrain costs you no extra movement. You can also pass through nonmagical plants without being slowed by them and without taking damage from them if they have thorns, spines, or a similar hazard.
In addition, you have advantage on saving throws against plants that are magically created or manipulated to impede movement, such those created by the entangle spell.

desc: 当你达到4级、8级、12级、16级和19级时，你可以选择一个能力值提升2点，或选择两个能力值各提升1点。通常情况下，你不能使用此特性将能力值提升到20以上。
desc_en: When you reach 4th level, and again at 8th, 12th, 16th, and 19th level, you can increase one ability score of your choice by 2, or you can increase two ability scores of your choice by 1. As normal, you can't increase an ability score above 20 using this feature.

name: 结社法术（4级）
desc: 你与土地的神秘联系赋予你施展某些法术的能力。在3级、5级、7级和9级时，你获得与你成为德鲁伊的那片土地相关的结社法术。
选择那片土地——极地、海岸、沙漠、森林、草原、山地或沼泽——并查阅相关的法术列表。
一旦你获得某个结社法术，你就始终准备有该法术，且它不计入你每天可准备的法术数量。如果你获得的法术不在德鲁伊法术列表上，该法术对你而言仍然是德鲁伊法术。
desc_en: Your mystical connection to the land infuses you with the ability to cast certain spells. At 3rd, 5th, 7th, and 9th level you gain access to circle spells connected to the land where you became a druid.
Choose that land--arctic, coast, desert, forest, grassland, mountain, or swamp--and consult the associated list of spells.

Once you gain access to a circle spell, you always have it prepared, and it doesn't count against the number of spells you can prepare each day. If you gain access to a spell that doesn't appear on the druid spell list, the spell is nonetheless a druid spell for you.

name: 德鲁伊结社特性
desc: 在2级时，你选择认同一个德鲁伊结社，如大地结社。你的选择在2级时赋予你特性，并在6级、10级和14级时再次赋予你特性。
desc_en: At 2nd level, you choose to identify with a circle of druids, such as the Circle of the Land. Your choice grants you features at 2nd level and again at 6th, 10th, and 14th level.

name: 自然守护
desc: 当你达到10级时，你无法被元素生物或精类魅惑或恐惧，且你对毒素和疾病免疫。
desc_en: When you reach 10th level, you can't be charmed or frightened by elementals or fey, and you are immune to poison and disease.

name: 属性值提升
desc: 当你达到4级、8级、12级、16级和19级时，你可以选择一个能力值提升2点，或选择两个能力值各提升1点。通常情况下，你不能使用此特性将能力值提升到20以上。
desc_en: When you reach 4th level, and again at 8th, 12th, 16th, and 19th level, you can increase one ability score of your choice by 2, or you can increase two ability scores of your choice by 1. As normal, you can't increase an ability score above 20 using this feature.

name: 德鲁伊结社特性
desc: 在2级时，你选择认同一个德鲁伊结社，如大地结社。你的选择在2级时赋予你特性，并在6级、10级和14级时再次赋予你特性。
desc_en: At 2nd level, you choose to identify with a circle of druids, such as the Circle of the Land. Your choice grants you features at 2nd level and again at 6th, 10th, and 14th level.

name: 自然圣所
desc: 当你达到14级时，自然界的生物能感知你与自然的联系，对攻击你产生犹豫。当野兽或植物生物攻击你时，该生物必须对你的德鲁伊法术豁免DC进行感知豁免。豁免失败时，该生物必须选择另一个目标，否则攻击自动未命中。豁免成功时，该生物在24小时内对此效果免疫。该生物在攻击你之前就知道此效果。
desc_en: When you reach 14th level, creatures of the natural world sense your connection to nature and become hesitant to attack you. When a beast or plant creature attacks you, that creature must make a Wisdom saving throw against your druid spell save DC. On a failed save, the creature must choose a different target, or the attack automatically misses. On a successful save, the creature is immune to this effect for 24 hours. The creature is aware of this effect before it makes its attack against you.

name: 属性值提升
desc: 当你达到4级、8级、12级、16级和19级时，你可以选择一个能力值提升2点，或选择两个能力值各提升1点。通常情况下，你不能使用此特性将能力值提升到20以上。
desc_en: When you reach 4th level, and again at 8th, 12th, 16th, and 19th level, you can increase one ability score of your choice by 2, or you can increase two ability scores of your choice by 1. As normal, you can't increase an ability score above 20 using this feature.

name: 不朽身
desc: 从18级开始，你运用的原始魔法使你衰老得更加缓慢。每过去10年，你的身体只衰老1年。
desc_en: Starting at 18th level, the primal magic that you wield causes you to age more slowly. For every 10 years that pass, your body ages only 1 year.

name: 野兽法术
desc: 从18级开始，你可以在使用荒野形态变身的任何形态下施展许多德鲁伊法术。你可以在野兽形态下执行德鲁伊法术的姿势和语言成分，但你无法提供材料成分。
desc_en: Beginning at 18th level, you can cast many of your druid spells in any shape you assume using Wild Shape. You can perform the somatic and verbal components of a druid spell while in a beast shape, but you aren't able to provide material components.

name: 属性值提升
desc: 当你达到4级、8级、12级、16级和19级时，你可以选择一个能力值提升2点，或选择两个能力值各提升1点。通常情况下，你不能使用此特性将能力值提升到20以上。
desc_en: When you reach 4th level, and again at 8th, 12th, 16th, and 19th level, you can increase one ability score of your choice by 2, or you can increase two ability scores of your choice by 1. As normal, you can't increase an ability score above 20 using this feature.

name: 大德鲁伊
desc: 在20级时，你可以无限次使用荒野形态。
此外，你可以忽略德鲁伊法术的语言和姿势成分，以及任何没有价格且不会被法术消耗的材料的成分。你在正常形态和荒野形态的野兽形态下都获得此好处。
desc_en: At 20th level, you can use your Wild Shape an unlimited number of times.

Additionally, you can ignore the verbal and somatic components of your druid spells, as well as any material components that lack a cost and aren't consumed by a spell. You gain this benefit in both your normal shape and your beast shape from Wild Shape.

name: 战斗风格
desc: 你采用一种特定的战斗风格作为你的专长。从以下选项中选择一项。你不能多次选择同一种战斗风格，即使你之后再次获得选择机会。
desc_en: You adopt a particular style of fighting as your specialty. Choose one of the following options. You can't take a Fighting Style option more than once, even if you later get to choose again.

name: 战斗风格：箭术
desc: 你使用远程武器进行的攻击检定获得+2加值。
desc_en: You gain a +2 bonus to attack rolls you make with ranged weapons.

name: 战斗风格：防御
desc: 当你穿戴护甲时，你的AC获得+1加值。
desc_en: While you are wearing armor, you gain a +1 bonus to AC.

name: 战斗风格：对决
desc: 当你单手持握一把近战武器且没有持握其他武器时，你使用该武器的伤害骰获得+2加值。
desc_en: When you are wielding a melee weapon in one hand and no other weapons, you gain a +2 bonus to damage rolls with that weapon.

name: 战斗风格：巨武器战斗
desc: 当你用双手持握的近战武器进行攻击时，如果伤害骰掷出1或2，你可以重掷该骰子，并且必须使用新的结果，即使新的结果仍然是1或2。该武器必须具有双手或两用特性才能获得此好处。
desc_en: When you roll a 1 or 2 on a damage die for an attack you make with a melee weapon that you are wielding with two hands, you can reroll the die and must use the new roll, even if the new roll is a 1 or a 2. The weapon must have the two-handed or versatile property for you to gain this benefit.

name: 战斗风格：守护
desc: 当你能看到的一个生物攻击5尺内除你以外的目标时，你可以使用反应迫使该攻击检定具有劣势。你必须持握一面盾牌。
desc_en: When a creature you can see attacks a target other than you that is within 5 feet of you, you can use your reaction to impose disadvantage on the attack roll. You must be wielding a shield.

name: 战斗风格：双武器战斗
desc: 当你进行双武器战斗时，你可以将属性调整值加到第二次攻击的伤害上。
desc_en: When you engage in two-weapon fighting, you can add your ability modifier to the damage of the second attack.

name: 回气
desc: 你拥有有限的耐力源泉，可以从中汲取来保护你免受伤害。在你的回合，你可以使用附赠动作恢复1d10+你战士等级的生命值。一旦你使用此特性，你必须完成短休或长休后才能再次使用。
desc_en: You have a limited well of stamina that you can draw on to protect yourself from harm. On your turn, you can use a bonus action to regain hit points equal to 1d10 + your fighter level. Once you use this feature, you must finish a short or long rest before you can use it again.

name: 动作如潮（1次）
desc: 从2级开始，你可以在短时间内超越自己的正常极限。在你的回合，你可以采取一个额外动作，除了你的常规动作和可能的附赠动作之外。
一旦你使用此特性，你必须完成短休或长休后才能再次使用。从17级开始，你可以在休息前使用两次，但在同一回合只能使用一次。
desc_en: Starting at 2nd level, you can push yourself beyond your normal limits for a moment. On your turn, you can take one additional action on top of your regular action and a possible bonus action.
Once you use this feature, you must finish a short or long rest before you can use it again. Starting at 17th level, you can use it twice before a rest, but only once on the same turn.

name: 武术范型
desc: 在3级时，你选择一个范型，努力在你的战斗风格和技巧中效仿它，例如勇士范型。你选择的范型在3级以及7、10、15、18级时赋予你特性。
desc_en: At 3rd level, you choose an archetype that you strive to emulate in your combat styles and techniques, such as Champion. The archetype you choose grants you features at 3rd level and again at 7th, 10th, 15th, and 18th level.

name: 精通暴击
desc: 从你在3级选择此范型开始，你的武器攻击在掷出19或20时造成重击。
desc_en: Beginning when you choose this archetype at 3rd level, your weapon attacks score a critical hit on a roll of 19 or 20.

name: 属性值提升
desc: 当你达到4级，以及6、8、12、14、16、19级时，你可以将一项自选属性值提升2点，或者将两项自选属性值各提升1点。正常而言，你不能通过此特性将属性值提升到20以上。
desc_en: When you reach 4th level, and again at 6th, 8th, 12th, 14th, 16th, and 19th level, you can increase one ability score of your choice by 2, or you can increase two ability scores of your choice by 1. As normal, you can't increase an ability score above 20 using this feature.

name: 额外攻击
desc: 从5级开始，每当你在你的回合采取攻击动作时，你可以攻击两次而非一次。当你在此职业达到11级时，攻击次数增加到三次，达到20级时增加到四次。
desc_en: Beginning at 5th level, you can attack twice, instead of once, whenever you take the Attack action on your turn. The number of attacks increases to three when you reach 11th level in this class and to four when you reach 20th level in this class.

name: 属性值提升
desc: 当你达到4级，以及6、8、12、14、16、19级时，你可以将一项自选属性值提升2点，或者将两项自选属性值各提升1点。正常而言，你不能通过此特性将属性值提升到20以上。
desc_en: When you reach 4th level, and again at 6th, 8th, 12th, 14th, 16th, and 19th level, you can increase one ability score of your choice by 2, or you can increase two ability scores of your choice by 1. As normal, you can't increase an ability score above 20 using this feature.

name: 非凡运动员
desc: 从7级开始，你可以将一半的熟练加值（向上取整）加到任何不使用你熟练加值的力量、敏捷或体质检定上。此外，当你进行奔跑跳远时，你可以跳过的距离增加等于你力量调整值的尺数。
desc_en: Starting at 7th level, you can add half your proficiency bonus (round up) to any Strength, Dexterity, or Constitution check you make that doesn't already use your proficiency bonus. In addition, when you make a running long jump, the distance you can cover increases by a number of feet equal to your Strength modifier.

name: 武术范型特性
desc: 在3级时，你选择一个范型，努力在你的战斗风格和技巧中效仿它，例如勇士范型。你选择的范型在3级以及7、10、15、18级时赋予你特性。
desc_en: At 3rd level, you choose an archetype that you strive to emulate in your combat styles and techniques, such as Champion. The archetype you choose grants you features at 3rd level and again at 7th, 10th, 15th, and 18th level.

name: 属性值提升
desc: 当你达到4级，以及6、8、12、14、16、19级时，你可以将一项自选属性值提升2点，或者将两项自选属性值各提升1点。正常而言，你不能通过此特性将属性值提升到20以上。
desc_en: When you reach 4th level, and again at 6th, 8th, 12th, 14th, 16th, and 19th level, you can increase one ability score of your choice by 2, or you can increase two ability scores of your choice by 1. As normal, you can't increase an ability score above 20 using this feature.

name: 不屈（1次）
desc: 从9级开始，你可以重掷一次失败的豁免检定。如果你这样做，你必须使用新的结果，并且直到你完成长休前不能再次使用此特性。从13级开始，你可以在两次长休之间使用此特性两次，从17级开始可以使用三次。
desc_en: Beginning at 9th level, you can reroll a saving throw that you fail. If you do so, you must use the new roll, and you can't use this feature again until you finish a long rest. You can use this feature twice between long rests starting at 13th level and three times between long rests starting at 17th level.

name: 额外战斗风格
desc: 在10级时，你可以从战斗风格职业特性中选择第二项。
desc_en: At 10th level, you can choose a second option from the Fighting Style class feature.

name: 武术范型特性
desc: 在3级时，你选择一个范型，努力在你的战斗风格和技巧中效仿它，例如勇士范型。你选择的范型在3级以及7、10、15、18级时赋予你特性。
