desc: 在3级时，你选择一个范型，努力在你的战斗风格和技巧中效仿它，例如勇士范型。你选择的范型在3级以及7、10、15、18级时赋予你特性。
desc_en: At 3rd level, you choose an archetype that you strive to emulate in your combat styles and techniques, such as Champion. The archetype you choose grants you features at 3rd level and again at 7th, 10th, 15th, and 18th level.

name: 幸存者
desc: 在18级时，你达到了战斗中韧性的巅峰。在你的每个回合开始时，如果你剩余的生命值不超过最大值的一半，你恢复5+你体质调整值的生命值。如果你的生命值为0，你不会获得此好处。
desc_en: At 18th level, you attain the pinnacle of resilience in battle. At the start of each of your turns, you regain hit points equal to 5 + your Constitution modifier if you have no more than half of your hit points left. You don't gain this benefit if you have 0 hit points.

name: 属性值提升
desc: 当你达到4级，以及6、8、12、14、16、19级时，你可以将一项自选属性值提升2点，或者将两项自选属性值各提升1点。正常而言，你不能通过此特性将属性值提升到20以上。
desc_en: When you reach 4th level, and again at 6th, 8th, 12th, 14th, 16th, and 19th level, you can increase one ability score of your choice by 2, or you can increase two ability scores of your choice by 1. As normal, you can't increase an ability score above 20 using this feature.

name: 额外攻击（3）
desc: 从5级开始，每当你在你的回合采取攻击动作时，你可以攻击两次而非一次。当你在此职业达到11级时，攻击次数增加到三次，达到20级时增加到四次。
desc_en: Beginning at 5th level, you can attack twice, instead of once, whenever you take the Attack action on your turn. The number of attacks increases to three when you reach 11th level in this class and to four when you reach 20th level in this class.

name: 无甲防御
desc: 从1级开始，当你未穿戴护甲且未持握盾牌时，你的AC等于10+你的敏捷调整值+你的感知调整值。
desc_en: Beginning at 1st level, while you are wearing no armor and not wielding a shield, your AC equals 10 + your Dexterity modifier + your Wisdom modifier.

name: 武术
desc: 在1级时，你的武术练习让你精通使用徒手打击和武僧武器的战斗风格，武僧武器是短剑和任何不具有双手或重型属性的简易近战武器。
当你在徒手或仅持握武僧武器且未穿戴护甲或持握盾牌时，你获得以下好处：
- 你可以使用敏捷代替力量进行徒手打击和武僧武器的攻击和伤害检定。
- 你可以掷d4代替徒手打击或武僧武器的正常伤害。这枚骰子随着你获得武僧等级而变化，如武僧表格中的武术列所示。
- 当你在你的回合使用攻击动作进行徒手打击或使用武僧武器时，你可以使用附赠动作进行一次徒手打击。例如，如果你采取攻击动作并使用长棍攻击，你也可以使用附赠动作进行徒手打击，假设你这回合还没有使用附赠动作。
某些修道院使用专门的武僧武器形式。例如，你可能使用由短链连接的两段木棍（称为双节棍）或带有较短直刃的镰刀（称为镰）。无论你使用什么名称来称呼武僧武器，你都可以使用该武器提供的游戏统计数据。
desc_en: At 1st level, your practice of martial arts gives you mastery of combat styles that use unarmed strikes and monk weapons, which are shortswords and any simple melee weapons that don't have the two- handed or heavy property.
You gain the following benefits while you are unarmed or wielding only monk weapons and you aren't wearing armor or wielding a shield:
- You can use Dexterity instead of Strength for the attack and damage rolls of your unarmed strikes and monk weapons.
- You can roll a d4 in place of the normal damage of your unarmed strike or monk weapon. This die changes as you gain monk levels, as shown in the Martial Arts column of Table: The Monk.

- When you use the Attack action with an unarmed strike or a monk weapon on your turn, you can make one unarmed strike as a bonus action. For example, if you take the Attack action and attack with a quarterstaff, you can also make an unarmed strike as a bonus action, assuming you haven't already taken a bonus action this turn.

Certain monasteries use specialized forms of the monk weapons. For example, you might use a club that is two lengths of wood connected by a short chain (called a nunchaku) or a sickle with a shorter, straighter blade (called a kama). Whatever name you use for a monk weapon, you can use the game statistics provided for the weapon.

name: 气
desc: 从2级开始，你的训练让你能够驾驭气的神秘能量。你获得这种能量的途径由气点数量表示。你的武僧等级决定了你拥有的点数，如武僧表格中的气点列所示。
你可以花费这些点数来驱动各种气特性。你开始知道三个这样的特性：疾风连击、Patient Defense和疾风步。随着你在此职业获得等级，你会学习更多气特性。
当你花费一个气点时，它直到你完成短休或长休才恢复，在休息结束时你将所有消耗的气吸回体内。你必须至少冥想30分钟才能恢复你的气点。
你的一些气特性需要目标进行豁免检定来抵抗特性的效果。豁免DC计算如下：
气豁免DC = 8 + 你的熟练加值 + 你的感知调整值
desc_en: Starting at 2nd level, your training allows you to harness the mystic energy of ki. Your access to this energy is represented by a number of ki points. Your monk level determines the number of points you have, as shown in the Ki Points column of Table: The Monk.

You can spend these points to fuel various ki features. You start knowing three such features: Flurry of Blows, Patient Defense, and Step of the Wind. You learn more ki features as you gain levels in this class.

When you spend a ki point, it is unavailable until you finish a short or long rest, at the end of which you draw all of your expended ki back into yourself. You must spend at least 30 minutes of the rest meditating to regain your ki points.
Some of your ki features require your target to make a saving throw to resist the feature's effects. The saving throw DC is calculated as follows:
Ki save DC = 8 + your proficiency bonus + your Wisdom modifier

name: 疾风连击
desc: 在你回合采取攻击动作后，你可以立即花费1点气来使用附赠动作进行两次徒手打击。
desc_en: Immediately after you take the Attack action on your turn, you can spend 1 ki point to make two unarmed strikes as a bonus action.

name: 耐心防御
desc: 你可以花费1点气在你的回合使用附赠动作进行闪避动作。
desc_en: You can spend 1 ki point to take the Dodge action as a bonus action on your turn.

name: 步若疾风
desc: 你可以花费1点气在你的回合使用附赠动作进行撤离或疾行动作，且你这回合的跳跃距离翻倍。
desc_en: You can spend 1 ki point to take the Disengage or Dash action as a bonus action on your turn, and your jump distance is doubled for the turn.

name: 无甲移动
desc: 从2级开始，当你未穿戴护甲或未持握盾牌时，你的速度增加10尺。这个加值在你达到特定武僧等级时增加，如武僧表格所示。
在9级时，你获得在回合期间沿垂直表面和液体移动而不坠落的能力。
desc_en: Starting at 2nd level, your speed increases by 10 feet while you are not wearing armor or wielding a shield. This bonus increases when you reach certain monk levels, as shown in Table: The Monk.
At 9th level, you gain the ability to move along vertical surfaces and across liquids on your turn without falling during the move.

name: 修道传统
desc: 当你达到3级时，你投身于一种修道传统，例如敞掌之道。你的传统在3级以及6、11、17级时赋予你特性。
desc_en: When you reach 3rd level, you commit yourself to a monastic tradition, such as the Way of the Open Hand. Your tradition grants you features at 3rd level and again at 6th, 11th, and 17th level.

name: 拨挡飞弹
desc: 从3级开始，当你被远程武器攻击命中时，你可以使用反应来拨挡或抓住飞弹。当你这样做时，你受到的攻击伤害减少1d10+你的敏捷调整值+你的武僧等级。
如果你将伤害减少到0，你可以抓住这枚飞弹，如果它足够小能被你用一只手抓住且你至少有一只手空闲。如果你用这种方式抓住一枚飞弹，你可以花费1点气作为同一反应的一部分，使用你刚抓住的武器或弹药进行远程攻击。你以熟练进行此攻击，无论你的武器熟练如何，且该飞弹对攻击视为武僧武器，具有20尺常规射程和60尺长射程。
desc_en: Starting at 3rd level, you can use your reaction to deflect or catch the missile when you are hit by a ranged weapon attack. When you do so, the damage you take from the attack is reduced by 1d10 + your Dexterity modifier + your monk level.

If you reduce the damage to 0, you can catch the missile if it is small enough for you to hold in one hand and you have at least one hand free. If you catch a missile in this way, you can spend 1 ki point to make a ranged attack with the weapon or piece of ammunition you just caught, as part of the same reaction. You make this attack with proficiency, regardless of your weapon proficiencies, and the missile counts as a monk weapon for the attack, which has a normal range of 20 feet and a long range of 60 feet.

name: 散打技法
desc: 从你在3级选择此传统开始，当你驾驭自己的气时可以操纵敌人的气。每当你用疾风连击授予的攻击命中生物时，你可以对该目标施加以下效果之一：
- 它必须成功通过敏捷豁免检定，否则被击倒。
- 它必须进行力量豁免检定。如果失败，你可以将它推离最多15尺。
- 它直到你的下个回合结束不能进行反应。
desc_en: Starting when you choose this tradition at 3rd level, you can manipulate your enemy's ki when you harness your own. Whenever you hit a creature with one of the attacks granted by your Flurry of Blows, you can impose one of the following effects on that target:
- It must succeed on a Dexterity saving throw or be knocked prone.
- It must make a Strength saving throw. If it fails, you can push it up to 15 feet away from you.
- It can't take reactions until the end of your next turn.

name: 属性值提升
desc: 当你达到4级，以及8、12、16、19级时，你可以将一项自选属性值提升2点，或者将两项自选属性值各提升1点。正常而言，你不能通过此特性将属性值提升到20以上。
desc_en: When you reach 4th level, and again at 8th, 12th, 16th, and 19th level, you can increase one ability score of your choice by 2, or you can increase two ability scores of your choice by 1. As normal, you can't increase an ability score above 20 using this feature.

name: 轻身坠
desc: 从4级开始，当你坠落时可以使用反应来减少你受到的坠落伤害，减少量等于五倍你的武僧等级。
desc_en: Beginning at 4th level, you can use your reaction when you fall to reduce any falling damage you take by an amount equal to five times your monk level.

name: 额外攻击
desc: 从5级开始，每当你在你的回合采取攻击动作时，你可以攻击两次而非一次。
desc_en: Beginning at 5th level, you can attack twice, instead of once, whenever you take the Attack action on your turn.

name: 震慑拳
desc: 从5级开始，你可以干扰对手体内的气流。当你用近战武器攻击命中另一个生物时，你可以花费1点气尝试震惧打击。目标必须成功通过体质豁免检定，否则被震慑直到你的下个回合结束。
desc_en: Starting at 5th level, you can interfere with the flow of ki in an opponent's body. When you hit another creature with a melee weapon attack, you can spend 1 ki point to attempt a stunning strike. The target must succeed on a Constitution saving throw or be stunned until the end of your next turn.

name: 气宗打击
desc: 从6级开始，你的徒手打击被视为魔法攻击，以克服对非魔法攻击和伤害的抗性和免疫。
desc_en: Starting at 6th level, your unarmed strikes count as magical for the purpose of overcoming resistance and immunity to nonmagical attacks and damage.

name: 修道传统特性
desc: 当你达到3级时，你投身于一种修道传统，例如敞掌之道。你的传统在3级以及6、11、17级时赋予你特性。
desc_en: When you reach 3rd level, you commit yourself to a monastic tradition, such as the Way of the Open Hand. Your tradition grants you features at 3rd level and again at 6th, 11th, and 17th level.

name: 身体安康
desc: 在6级时，你获得治疗自己的能力。作为一个动作，你可以恢复三倍于你武僧等级的生命值。你必须完成长休后才能再次使用此特性。
desc_en: At 6th level, you gain the ability to heal yourself. As an action, you can regain hit points equal to three times your monk level. You must finish a long rest before you can use this feature again.

name: 闪避
desc: 在7级时，你的本能敏捷让你能够躲避某些区域效果，例如蓝龙的闪电吐息或火球术。当你受到一个允许你进行敏捷豁免检定以只受一半伤害的效果影响时，如果你成功通过豁免检定，你改为不受伤害，如果失败则只受一半伤害。
desc_en: At 7th level, your instinctive agility lets you dodge out of the way of certain area effects, such as a blue dragon's lightning breath or a fireball spell. When you are subjected to an effect that allows you to make a Dexterity saving throw to take only half damage, you instead take no damage if you succeed on the saving throw, and only half damage if you fail.

name: 心如止水
desc: 从7级开始，你可以使用动作来结束自己身上导致你被魅惑或恐惧的一种效果。
desc_en: Starting at 7th level, you can use your action to end one effect on yourself that is causing you to be charmed or frightened.

name: 属性值提升
desc: 当你达到4级，以及8、12、16、19级时，你可以将一项自选属性值提升2点，或者将两项自选属性值各提升1点。正常而言，你不能通过此特性将属性值提升到20以上。
desc_en: When you reach 4th level, and again at 8th, 12th, 16th, and 19th level, you can increase one ability score of your choice by 2, or you can increase two ability scores of your choice by 1. As normal, you can't increase an ability score above 20 using this feature.

name: 无甲移动
desc: 从2级开始，当你未穿戴护甲或未持握盾牌时，你的速度增加10尺。这个加值在你达到特定武僧等级时增加，如武僧表格所示。
在9级时，你获得在回合期间沿垂直表面和液体移动而不坠落的能力。
desc_en: Starting at 2nd level, your speed increases by 10 feet while you are not wearing armor or wielding a shield. This bonus increases when you reach certain monk levels, as shown in Table: The Monk.
At 9th level, you gain the ability to move along vertical surfaces and across liquids on your turn without falling during the move.

name: 身净
desc: 在10级时，你对流经体内的气的掌握让你免疫疾病和毒素。
desc_en: At 10th level, your mastery of the ki flowing through you makes you immune to disease and poison.

name: 修道传统特性
desc: 当你达到3级时，你投身于一种修道传统，例如敞掌之道。你的传统在3级以及6、11、17级时赋予你特性。
desc_en: When you reach 3rd level, you commit yourself to a monastic tradition, such as the Way of the Open Hand. Your tradition grants you features at 3rd level and again at 6th, 11th, and 17th level.

name: 宁静
desc: 从11级开始，你可以进入一种特殊的冥想，让你被平静的光环包围。在长休结束时，你获得圣域术的效果，持续到你的下次长休开始（该法术可以像正常一样提前结束）。该法术的豁免DC等于8+你的感知调整值+你的熟练加值。
desc_en: Beginning at 11th level, you can enter a special meditation that surrounds you with an aura of peace. At the end of a long rest, you gain the effect of a sanctuary spell that lasts until the start of your next long rest (the spell can end early as normal). The saving throw DC for the spell equals 8 + your Wisdom modifier + your proficiency bonus.

name: 属性值提升
desc: 当你达到4级，以及8、12、16、19级时，你可以将一项自选属性值提升2点，或者将两项自选属性值各提升1点。正常而言，你不能通过此特性将属性值提升到20以上。
desc_en: When you reach 4th level, and again at 8th, 12th, 16th, and 19th level, you can increase one ability score of your choice by 2, or you can increase two ability scores of your choice by 1. As normal, you can't increase an ability score above 20 using this feature.

name: 天语通
desc: 从13级开始，你学会触碰其他心灵的气，以便你理解所有口语。此外，任何能理解语言的生物都能理解你说的话。
name_en: Tongue of the Sun and Moon
desc_en: Starting at 13th level, you learn to touch the ki of other minds so that you understand all spoken languages. Moreover, any creature that can understand a language can understand what you say.

name: 金刚魂
desc: 从14级开始，你对气的掌握让你获得所有豁免检定的熟练。
此外，每当你进行豁免检定失败时，你可以花费1点气来重掷并采用第二次结果。
desc_en: Beginning at 14th level, your mastery of ki grants you proficiency in all saving throws.
Additionally, whenever you make a saving throw and fail, you can spend 1 ki point to reroll it and take the second result.

name: 不朽身
desc: 在15级时，你的气维持着你，使你不受衰老的衰弱影响，且你不能被魔法衰老。然而，你仍然可能因年老而死。此外，你不再需要食物或水。
desc_en: At 15th level, your ki sustains you so that you suffer none of the frailty of old age, and you can't be aged magically. You can still die of old age, however. In addition, you no longer need food or water.

name: 属性值提升
desc: 当你达到4级，以及8、12、16、19级时，你可以将一项自选属性值提升2点，或者将两项自选属性值各提升1点。正常而言，你不能通过此特性将属性值提升到20以上。
desc_en: When you reach 4th level, and again at 8th, 12th, 16th, and 19th level, you can increase one ability score of your choice by 2, or you can increase two ability scores of your choice by 1. As normal, you can't increase an ability score above 20 using this feature.

name: 修道传统特性
desc: 当你达到3级时，你投身于一种修道传统，例如敞掌之道。你的传统在3级以及6、11、17级时赋予你特性。
desc_en: When you reach 3rd level, you commit yourself to a monastic tradition, such as the Way of the Open Hand. Your tradition grants you features at 3rd level and again at 6th, 11th, and 17th level.

name: 震惧掌
desc: 在17级时，你获得在某人体内设置致命振动的能力。当你用徒手打击命中生物时，你可以花费3点气开始这些难以察觉的振动，持续天数等于你的武僧等级。这些振动是无害的，除非你使用动作结束它们。要这样做，你和目标必须在同一位面。当你使用这个动作时，该生物必须进行体质豁免检定。如果失败，它被降至0生命值。如果成功，它受到10d10点死灵伤害。
你一次只能让一个生物处于此特性的效果下。你可以选择无害地结束振动而不需要动作。
desc_en: At 17th level, you gain the ability to set up lethal vibrations in someone's body. When you hit a creature with an unarmed strike, you can spend 3 ki points to start these imperceptible vibrations, which last for a number of days equal to your monk level. The vibrations are harmless unless you use your action to end them. To do so, you and the target must be on the same plane of existence. When you use this action, the creature must make a Constitution saving throw. If it fails, it is reduced to 0 hit points. If it succeeds, it takes 10d10 necrotic damage.
You can have only one creature under the effect of this feature at a time. You can choose to end the vibrations harmlessly without using an action.

name: 空身
desc: 从18级开始，你可以使用动作花费4点气变得隐形1分钟。在此期间，你对除力场伤害外的所有伤害具有抗性。
此外，你可以花费8点气来施展星界投射法术，不需要材料成分。当你这样做时，你不能带任何其他生物与你同行。
desc_en: Beginning at 18th level, you can use your action to spend 4 ki points to become invisible for 1 minute. During that time, you also have resistance to all damage but force damage.
Additionally, you can spend 8 ki points to cast the astral projection spell, without needing material components. When you do so, you can't take any other creatures with you.

name: 属性值提升
desc: 当你达到4级，以及8、12、16、19级时，你可以将一项自选属性值提升2点，或者将两项自选属性值各提升1点。正常而言，你不能通过此特性将属性值提升到20以上。
desc_en: When you reach 4th level, and again at 8th, 12th, 16th, and 19th level, you can increase one ability score of your choice by 2, or you can increase two ability scores of your choice by 1. As normal, you can't increase an ability score above 20 using this feature.

name: 完美自身
desc: 在20级时，当你掷先攻且没有剩余气点时，你恢复4点气。
desc_en: At 20th level, when you roll for initiative and have no ki points remaining, you regain 4 ki points.

name: 神圣感知
desc: 强烈的邪恶存在会像恶臭一样被你感知，而强大的善良会像天籁之音在你耳边回响。作为一个动作，你可以打开你的感知来侦测这些力量。直到你的下个回合结束，你知道60尺内任何未处于完全遮蔽下的天界生物、邪魔或不死生物的位置。你知道你感知到的任何存在的类型（天界生物、邪魔或不死生物），但不知道其身份。在同一范围内，你还能侦测到任何被祝圣或亵渎的地方或物品，如同圣居术的效果。
你可以使用此特性的次数等于1+你的魅力调整值。当你完成长休时，你恢复所有已消耗的使用次数。
desc_en: The presence of strong evil registers on your senses like a noxious odor, and powerful good rings like heavenly music in your ears. As an action, you can open your awareness to detect such forces. Until the end of your next turn, you know the location of any celestial, fiend, or undead within 60 feet of you that is not behind total cover. You know the type (celestial, fiend, or undead) of any being whose presence you sense, but not its identity. Within the same radius, you also detect the presence of any place or object that has been consecrated or desecrated, as with the hallow spell.
You can use this feature a number of times equal to 1 + your Charisma modifier. When you finish a long rest, you regain all expended uses.

name: 圣疗
desc: 你受祝福的触碰可以治疗伤口。你拥有一个治疗能量池，在你完成长休时补充。用那个池，你可以恢复总数等于你圣武士等级x5的生命值。
作为一个动作，你可以触碰一个生物并从池中汲取力量来恢复该生物的生命值，最多为池中剩余的最大数量。
或者，你可以从治疗池中消耗5点生命值来治愈目标的一种疾病或中和一种影响它的毒素。你可以通过单次使用圣疗治愈多种疾病和中和多种毒素，分别为每一种消耗生命值。
此特性对不死生物和构装生物无效。
desc_en: Your blessed touch can heal wounds. You have a pool of healing power that replenishes when you take a long rest. With that pool, you can restore a total number of hit points equal to your paladin level x 5.
As an action, you can touch a creature and draw power from the pool to restore a number of hit points to that creature, up to the maximum amount remaining in your pool.

Alternatively, you can expend 5 hit points from your pool of healing to cure the target of one disease or neutralize one poison affecting it. You can cure multiple diseases and neutralize multiple poisons with a single use of Lay on Hands, expending hit points separately for each one.
This feature has no effect on undead and constructs.

name: 战斗风格
desc: 在2级时，你采用一种战斗风格作为你的专长。从以下选项中选择一项。你不能多次选择同一种战斗风格，即使你之后再次获得选择机会。
desc_en: At 2nd level, you adopt a style of fighting as your specialty. Choose one of the following options. You can't take a Fighting Style option more than once, even if you later get to choose again.

name: 战斗风格：防御
desc: 当你穿戴护甲时，你的AC获得+1加值。
desc_en: While you are wearing armor, you gain a +1 bonus to AC.

name: 战斗风格：对决
desc: 当你单手持握一把近战武器且没有持握其他武器时，你使用该武器的伤害骰获得+2加值。
desc_en: When you are wielding a melee weapon in one hand and no other weapons, you gain a +2 bonus to damage rolls with that weapon.

name: 战斗风格：巨武器战斗
desc: 当你用双手持握的近战武器进行攻击时，如果伤害骰掷出1或2，你可以重掷该骰子，并且必须使用新的结果。该武器必须具有双手或两用特性才能获得此好处。
desc_en: When you roll a 1 or 2 on a damage die for an attack you make with a melee weapon that you are wielding with two hands, you can reroll the die and must use the new roll. The weapon must have the two-handed or versatile property for you to gain this benefit.

name: 战斗风格：守护
desc: 当你能看到的一个生物攻击5尺内除你以外的目标时，你可以使用反应迫使该攻击检定具有劣势。你必须持握一面盾牌。
desc_en: When a creature you can see attacks a target other than you that is within 5 feet of you, you can use your reaction to impose disadvantage on the attack roll. You must be wielding a shield.

name: 施法：圣武士
desc: 到2级时，你已经学会通过冥想和祈祷来汲取神圣魔法，像牧师一样施放法术。
desc_en: By 2nd level, you have learned to draw on divine magic through meditation and prayer to cast spells as a cleric does.

name: 至圣斩
desc: 从2级开始，当你用近战武器攻击命中生物时，你可以消耗一个法术位来对目标造成光耀伤害，除了武器伤害之外。1环法术位的额外伤害是2d8，每比1环高一个法术等级就增加1d8，最多5d8。如果目标是不死生物或邪魔，伤害增加1d8。
desc_en: Starting at 2nd level, when you hit a creature with a melee weapon attack, you can expend one spell slot to deal radiant damage to the target, in addition to the weapon's damage. The extra damage is 2d8 for a 1st-level spell slot, plus 1d8 for each spell level higher than 1st, to a maximum of 5d8. The damage increases by 1d8 if the target is an undead or a fiend.

name: 神圣健康
desc: 到3级时，流经你体内的神圣魔法让你免疫疾病。
desc_en: By 3rd level, the divine magic flowing through you makes you immune to disease.

name: 神圣誓约
desc: 当你达到3级时，你立下永远束缚你作为圣武士的誓言。在此之前你一直处于准备阶段，致力于这条道路但尚未宣誓。现在你选择一种誓言，例如奉献之誓。
你的选择在3级以及7、15、20级时赋予你特性。这些特性包括誓言法术和引导神力特性。
desc_en: When you reach 3rd level, you swear the oath that binds you as a paladin forever. Up to this time you have been in a preparatory stage, committed to the path but not yet sworn to it. Now you choose an oath, such as the Oath of Devotion.
Your choice grants you features at 3rd level and again at 7th, 15th, and 20th level. Those features include oath spells and the Channel Divinity feature.

name: 誓约法术
desc: 每种誓言都有相关联的法术列表。你在誓言描述中指定的等级获得这些法术。一旦你获得誓言法术，你总是准备好它。誓言法术不计入你每天可以准备的法术数量。
如果你获得一个不在圣武士法术列表上的誓言法术，该法术仍然是你的圣武士法术。
desc_en: Each oath has a list of associated spells. You gain access to these spells at the levels specified in the oath description. Once you gain access to an oath spell, you always have it prepared. Oath spells don't count against the number of spells you can prepare each day.
If you gain an oath spell that doesn't appear on the paladin spell list, the spell is nonetheless a paladin spell for you.

name: 引导神力
desc: 你的誓言让你能够引导神圣能量来驱动魔法效果。你的誓言提供的每个引导神力选项解释如何使用它。
当你使用引导神力时，你选择使用哪个选项。然后你必须完成短休或长休才能再次使用你的引导神力。
一些引导神力效果需要豁免检定。当你使用本职业的这种效果时，DC等于你的圣武士法术豁免DC。
desc_en: Your oath allows you to channel divine energy to fuel magical effects. Each Channel Divinity option provided by your oath explains how to use it.
When you use your Channel Divinity, you choose which option to use. You must then finish a short or long rest to use your Channel Divinity again.
Some Channel Divinity effects require saving throws. When you use such an effect from this class, the DC equals your paladin spell save DC.

name: 引导神力：神圣武器
desc: 作为一个动作，你可以使用引导神力将正能量注入你持握的一把武器。持续1分钟，你将魅力调整值加到使用该武器进行的攻击检定上（最少+1）。该武器还在20尺半径内发出明亮光芒，并在其外20尺发出微光。如果该武器尚未魔法，它在持续期间变为魔法武器。
你可以在你的回合作为任何其他动作的一部分结束此效果。如果你不再持握或携带此武器，或者你陷入昏迷，此效果结束。
desc_en: As an action, you can imbue one weapon that you are holding with positive energy, using your Channel Divinity. For 1 minute, you add your Charisma modifier to attack rolls made with that weapon (with a minimum bonus of +1). The weapon also emits bright light in a 20-foot radius and dim light 20 feet beyond that. If the weapon is not already magical, it becomes magical for the duration.
You can end this effect on your turn as part of any other action. If you are no longer holding or carrying this weapon, or if you fall unconscious, this effect ends.

name: 引导神力：驱散邪魔
desc: 作为一个动作，你展示你的圣徽并念诵谴责邪魔和不死生物的祷言，使用你的引导神力。30尺内每个能看到或听到你的邪魔或不死生物必须进行感知豁免检定。如果生物未能通过豁免检定，它被驱散1分钟或直到它受到伤害。
被驱散的生物必须尽其所能远离你，且它不能自愿移动到距离你30尺内的空间。它也不能进行反应。对于它的动作，它只能使用疾行动作或试图逃离阻止它移动的效果。如果没有地方可移动，该生物可以使用闪避动作。
desc_en: As an action, you present your holy symbol and speak a prayer censuring fiends and undead, using your Channel Divinity. Each fiend or undead that can see or hear you within 30 feet of you must make a Wisdom saving throw. If the creature fails its saving throw, it is turned for 1 minute or until it takes damage.

A turned creature must spend its turns trying to move as far away from you as it can, and it can't willingly move to a space within 30 feet of you. It also can't take reactions. For its action, it can use only the Dash action or try to escape from an effect that prevents it from moving. If there's nowhere to move, the creature can use the Dodge action.

name: 属性值提升
desc: 当你达到4级，以及8、12、16、19级时，你可以将一项自选属性值提升2点，或者将两项自选属性值各提升1点。正常而言，你不能通过此特性将属性值提升到20以上。
desc_en: When you reach 4th level, and again at 8th, 12th, 16th, and 19th level, you can increase one ability score of your choice by 2, or you can increase two ability scores of your choice by 1. As normal, you can't increase an ability score above 20 using this feature.

name: 额外攻击
desc: 从5级开始，每当你在你的回合采取攻击动作时，你可以攻击两次而非一次。
desc_en: Beginning at 5th level, you can attack twice, instead of once, whenever you take the Attack action on your turn.

name: 防护光环
desc: 从6级开始，每当你或10尺内的友方生物必须进行豁免检定时，该生物的豁免检定获得等于你魅力调整值的加值（最少+1）。你必须清醒才能提供此加值。
在18级时，此光环的范围增加到30尺。
desc_en: Starting at 6th level, whenever you or a friendly creature within 10 feet of you must make a saving throw, the creature gains a bonus to the saving throw equal to your Charisma modifier (with a minimum bonus of +1). You must be conscious to grant this bonus.
At 18th level, the range of this aura increases to 30 feet.

name: 神圣誓约特性
desc: 当你达到3级时，你立下永远束缚你作为圣武士的誓言。在此之前你一直处于准备阶段，致力于这条道路但尚未宣誓。现在你选择一种誓言，例如奉献之誓。
你的选择在3级以及7、15、20级时赋予你特性。这些特性包括誓言法术和引导神力特性。
desc_en: When you reach 3rd level, you swear the oath that binds you as a paladin forever. Up to this time you have been in a preparatory stage, committed to the path but not yet sworn to it. Now you choose an oath, such as the Oath of Devotion.
Your choice grants you features at 3rd level and again at 7th, 15th, and 20th level. Those features include oath spells and the Channel Divinity feature.

name: 奉献光环
desc: 从7级开始，你和10尺内的友方生物在你清醒时不能被魅惑。
在18级时，此光环的范围增加到30尺。
desc_en: Starting at 7th level, you and friendly creatures within 10 feet of you can't be charmed while you are conscious.
At 18th level, the range of this aura increases to 30 feet.

name: 属性值提升
desc: 当你达到4级，以及8、12、16、19级时，你可以将一项自选属性值提升2点，或者将两项自选属性值各提升1点。正常而言，你不能通过此特性将属性值提升到20以上。
desc_en: When you reach 4th level, and again at 8th, 12th, 16th, and 19th level, you can increase one ability score of your choice by 2, or you can increase two ability scores of your choice by 1. As normal, you can't increase an ability score above 20 using this feature.

name: 勇气光环
desc: 从10级开始，你和10尺内的友方生物在你清醒时不能被恐惧。
在18级时，此光环的范围增加到30尺。
desc_en: Starting at 10th level, you and friendly creatures within 10 feet of you can't be frightened while you are conscious.
At 18th level, the range of this aura increases to 30 feet.

name: 强化至圣斩
desc: 到11级时，你充满了正义之力，所有近战武器打击都带有神圣力量。每当你用近战武器命中生物时，该生物额外受到1d8光耀伤害。如果你也在攻击中使用神圣打击，你将此伤害加到神圣打击的额外伤害上。
desc_en: By 11th level, you are so suffused with righteous might that all your melee weapon strikes carry divine power with them. Whenever you hit a creature with a melee weapon, the creature takes an extra 1d8 radiant damage. If you also use your Divine Smite with an attack, you add this damage to the extra damage of your Divine Smite.

name: 属性值提升
desc: 当你达到4级，以及8、12、16、19级时，你可以将一项自选属性值提升2点，或者将两项自选属性值各提升1点。正常而言，你不能通过此特性将属性值提升到20以上。
desc_en: When you reach 4th level, and again at 8th, 12th, 16th, and 19th level, you can increase one ability score of your choice by 2, or you can increase two ability scores of your choice by 1. As normal, you can't increase an ability score above 20 using this feature.

name: 净化之触
desc: 从14级开始，你可以使用动作来结束自己身上或你触碰的一个自愿生物身上的一个法术。
你可以使用此特性的次数等于你的魅力调整值（至少一次）。当你完成长休时，你恢复已消耗的使用次数。
desc_en: Beginning at 14th level, you can use your action to end one spell on yourself or on one willing creature that you touch.
You can use this feature a number of times equal to your Charisma modifier (a minimum of once). You regain expended uses when you finish a long rest.

name: 神圣誓约特性
desc: 当你达到3级时，你立下永远束缚你作为圣武士的誓言。在此之前你一直处于准备阶段，致力于这条道路但尚未宣誓。现在你选择一种誓言，例如奉献之誓。
你的选择在3级以及7、15、20级时赋予你特性。这些特性包括誓言法术和引导神力特性。
desc_en: When you reach 3rd level, you swear the oath that binds you as a paladin forever. Up to this time you have been in a preparatory stage, committed to the path but not yet sworn to it. Now you choose an oath, such as the Oath of Devotion.
Your choice grants you features at 3rd level and again at 7th, 15th, and 20th level. Those features include oath spells and the Channel Divinity feature.

name: 精神纯净
desc: 从15级开始，你总是处于防护善恶法术的效果下。
desc_en: Beginning at 15th level, you are always under the effects of a protection from evil and good spell.

name: 属性值提升
desc: 当你达到4级，以及8、12、16、19级时，你可以将一项自选属性值提升2点，或者将两项自选属性值各提升1点。正常而言，你不能通过此特性将属性值提升到20以上。
desc_en: When you reach 4th level, and again at 8th, 12th, 16th, and 19th level, you can increase one ability score of your choice by 2, or you can increase two ability scores of your choice by 1. As normal, you can't increase an ability score above 20 using this feature.

name: 光环改善
desc: 在18级时，你的光环范围增加到30尺。
desc_en: At 18th level, the range of your auras increase to 30 feet.

name: 属性值提升
desc: 当你达到4级，以及8、12、16、19级时，你可以将一项自选属性值提升2点，或者将两项自选属性值各提升1点。正常而言，你不能通过此特性将属性值提升到20以上。
desc_en: When you reach 4th level, and again at 8th, 12th, 16th, and 19th level, you can increase one ability score of your choice by 2, or you can increase two ability scores of your choice by 1. As normal, you can't increase an ability score above 20 using this feature.

name: 神圣誓约特性
desc: 当你达到3级时，你立下永远束缚你作为圣武士的誓言。在此之前你一直处于准备阶段，致力于这条道路但尚未宣誓。现在你选择一种誓言，例如奉献之誓。
你的选择在3级以及7、15、20级时赋予你特性。这些特性包括誓言法术和引导神力特性。
desc_en: When you reach 3rd level, you swear the oath that binds you as a paladin forever. Up to this time you have been in a preparatory stage, committed to the path but not yet sworn to it. Now you choose an oath, such as the Oath of Devotion.
Your choice grants you features at 3rd level and again at 7th, 15th, and 20th level. Those features include oath spells and the Channel Divinity feature.

name: 圣洁光轮
desc: 在20级时，作为一个动作，你可以散发出阳光光环。持续1分钟，明亮光芒从你身上发出，半径30尺，微光在其外30尺。
每当敌对生物在明亮光芒中开始其回合时，该生物受到10点光耀伤害。
此外，在持续期间，你在对抗邪魔或不死生物施放的法术时，豁免检定具有优势。
desc_en: At 20th level, as an action, you can emanate an aura of sunlight. For 1 minute, bright light shines from you in a 30-foot radius, and dim light shines 30 feet beyond that.
Whenever an enemy creature starts its turn in the bright light, the creature takes 10 radiant damage.
In addition, for the duration, you have advantage on saving throws against spells cast by fiends or undead.

name: 宿敌（1种）
desc: 从1级开始，你对某种特定类型的敌人拥有丰富的经验，研究、追踪、狩猎，甚至与它们交谈。
选择一种宿敌类型：异怪、野兽、天界生物、构装生物、龙、元素生物、精类、邪魔、巨人、怪兽、泥怪、植物或不死生物。或者，你可以选择两种类人生物种族（如豺狼人和兽人）作为宿敌。
你在追踪宿敌的感知（求生）检定以及回忆关于它们的信息的智力检定上具有优势。
当你获得此特性时，如果宿敌会说某种语言，你还可以学会一种由宿敌说的自选语言。
在6级和14级时，你分别选择一种额外的宿敌以及相关的语言。随着你获得等级，你的选择应该反映你在冒险中遇到的怪物类型。
desc_en: Beginning at 1st level, you have significant experience studying, tracking, hunting, and even talking to a certain type of enemy.

Choose a type of favored enemy: aberrations, beasts, celestials, constructs, dragons, elementals, fey, fiends, giants, monstrosities, oozes, plants, or undead. Alternatively, you can select two races of humanoid (such as gnolls and orcs) as favored enemies.
You have advantage on Wisdom (Survival) checks to track your favored enemies, as well as on Intelligence checks to recall information about them.
When you gain this feature, you also learn one language of your choice that is spoken by your favored enemies, if they speak one at all.

You choose one additional favored enemy, as well as an associated language, at 6th and 14th level. As you gain levels, your choices should reflect the types of monsters you have encountered on your adventures.

name: 自然探索者（1种地形）
desc: 你对一种自然环境特别熟悉，善于在这种区域旅行和生存。选择一种偏好地形：极地、海岸、沙漠、森林、草原、山地或沼泽。当你进行与偏好地形相关的智力或感知检定时，如果你熟练于所使用的技能，你的熟练加值翻倍。
在偏好地形中旅行一小时或更长时间时，你获得以下好处：
- 困难地形不会减慢你团队的移动速度。
- 除非通过魔法手段，否则你的团队不会迷路。
- 即使你在旅行时忙于其他活动（如搜寻食物、导航或追踪），你也能保持对危险的警觉。
- 如果你独自旅行，你可以以正常速度隐秘移动。
- 当你搜寻食物时，你找到的食物是正常数量的两倍。
- 在追踪其他生物时，你还能得知它们的准确数量、体型以及它们经过该区域的时间。
在6级和10级时，你可以选择额外的偏好地形类型。
desc_en: You are particularly familiar with one type of natural environment and are adept at traveling and surviving in such regions. Choose one type of favored terrain: arctic, coast, desert, forest, grassland, mountain, or swamp. When you make an Intelligence or Wisdom check related to your favored terrain, your proficiency bonus is doubled if you are using a skill that you're proficient in.
While traveling for an hour or more in your favored terrain, you gain the following benefits:
- Difficult terrain doesn't slow your group's travel.
- Your group can't become lost except by magical means.
- Even when you are engaged in another activity while traveling (such as foraging, navigating, or tracking), you remain alert to danger.
- If you are traveling alone, you can move stealthily at a normal pace.
- When you forage, you find twice as much food as you normally would.
- While tracking other creatures, you also learn their exact number, their sizes, and how long ago they passed through the area.
You choose additional favored terrain types at 6th and 10th level.

name: 战斗风格
desc: 在2级时，你采用一种特定的战斗风格作为你的专长。选择以下选项之一。你不能多次选择同一战斗风格选项，即使你之后有机会再次选择。
desc_en: At 2nd level, you adopt a particular style of fighting as your specialty. Choose one of the following options. You can't take a Fighting Style option more than once, even if you later get to choose again.

name: 战斗风格：箭术
desc: 你使用远程武器进行的攻击检定获得+2加值。
desc_en: You gain a +2 bonus to attack rolls you make with ranged weapons.

name: 战斗风格：防御
desc: 当你穿戴护甲时，你的AC获得+1加值。
desc_en: While you are wearing armor, you gain a +1 bonus to AC.

name: 战斗风格：对决
desc: 当你单手持用一把近战武器且没有其他武器时，你用该武器进行的伤害检定获得+2加值。
desc_en: When you are wielding a melee weapon in one hand and no other weapons, you gain a +2 bonus to damage rolls with that weapon.

name: 战斗风格：双武器战斗
desc: 当你进行双武器战斗时，你可以将能力调整值加到第二次攻击的伤害上。
desc_en: When you engage in two-weapon fighting, you can add your ability modifier to the damage of the second attack.

name: 施法：游侠
desc: 当你达到2级时，你已经学会使用自然的魔法本质来施法，就像德鲁伊一样。
desc_en: By the time you reach 2nd level, you have learned to use the magical essence of nature to cast spells, much as a druid does.

name: 游侠范型
desc: 在3级时，你选择一个你努力模仿的范型，如猎人。你的选择在3级时赋予你特性，并在7级、11级和15级时再次赋予你特性。
desc_en: At 3rd level, you choose an archetype that you strive to emulate, such as the Hunter. Your choice grants you features at 3rd level and again at 7th, 11th, and 15th level.

name: 猎手猎物
desc: 在3级时，你获得以下特性之一（自选）。
巨人杀手
巨像杀手
群体猎手
desc_en: At 3rd level, you gain one of the following features of your choice.
Colossus Slayer
Giant Killer
Horde Breaker

name: 猎手猎物：巨人杀手
desc: 你的坚韧可以消耗最强大的敌人。当你用武器攻击命中一个生物时，如果该生物的生命值低于其最大值，该生物额外受到1d8伤害。每回合你只能造成一次这种额外伤害。
desc_en: Your tenacity can wear down the most potent foes. When you hit a creature with a weapon attack, the creature takes an extra 1d8 damage if it's below its hit point maximum. You can deal this extra damage only once per turn.

name: 猎手猎物：巨人克星
desc: 当距离你5尺内的大型或更大生物命中或落空对你的攻击时，你可以使用反应立即在该生物攻击后攻击它，前提是你能看到该生物。
desc_en: When a Large or larger creature within 5 feet of you hits or misses you with an attack, you can use your reaction to attack that creature immediately after its attack, provided that you can see the creature.

name: 猎手猎物：群敌分割
desc: 在你的每个回合中，当你使用武器攻击时，你可以使用同一武器对距离原始目标5尺内且在武器射程内的另一个生物再进行一次攻击。
desc_en: Once on each of your turns when you make a weapon attack, you can make another attack with the same weapon against a different creature that is within 5 feet of the original target and within range of your weapon.

name: 原始意识
desc: 从3级开始，你可以使用动作并消耗一个游侠法术位，将注意力集中在你周围的区域。每消耗法术位等级1分钟，你可以感知1英里内（如果你在偏好地形中则为6英里内）是否存在以下类型的生物：异怪、天界生物、龙、元素生物、精类、邪魔和不死生物。此特性不会揭示生物的位置或数量。
desc_en: Beginning at 3rd level, you can use your action and expend one ranger spell slot to focus your awareness on the region around you. For 1 minute per level of the spell slot you expend, you can sense whether the following types of creatures are present within 1 mile of you (or within up to 6 miles if you are in your favored terrain): aberrations, celestials, dragons, elementals, fey, fiends, and undead. This feature doesn't reveal the creatures' location or number.

name: 属性值提升
desc: 当你达到4级、8级、12级、16级和19级时，你可以选择一个能力值提升2点，或选择两个能力值各提升1点。通常情况下，你不能使用此特性将能力值提升到20以上。
desc_en: When you reach 4th level, and again at 8th, 12th, 16th, and 19th level, you can increase one ability score of your choice by 2, or you can increase two ability scores of your choice by 1. As normal, you can't increase an ability score above 20 using this feature.

name: 额外攻击
desc: 从5级开始，你可以在你的回合进行攻击动作时攻击两次而非一次。
desc_en: Beginning at 5th level, you can attack twice, instead of once, whenever you take the Attack action on your turn.

name: 宿敌（2种）
desc: 从1级开始，你对某种特定类型的敌人拥有丰富的经验，研究、追踪、狩猎，甚至与它们交谈。
选择一种宿敌类型：异怪、野兽、天界生物、构装生物、龙、元素生物、精类、邪魔、巨人、怪兽、泥怪、植物或不死生物。或者，你可以选择两种类人生物种族（如豺狼人和兽人）作为宿敌。
你在追踪宿敌的感知（求生）检定以及回忆关于它们的信息的智力检定上具有优势。
当你获得此特性时，如果宿敌会说某种语言，你还可以学会一种由宿敌说的自选语言。
在6级和14级时，你分别选择一种额外的宿敌以及相关的语言。随着你获得等级，你的选择应该反映你在冒险中遇到的怪物类型。
desc_en: Beginning at 1st level, you have significant experience studying, tracking, hunting, and even talking to a certain type of enemy.

Choose a type of favored enemy: aberrations, beasts, celestials, constructs, dragons, elementals, fey, fiends, giants, monstrosities, oozes, plants, or undead. Alternatively, you can select two races of humanoid (such as gnolls and orcs) as favored enemies.
You have advantage on Wisdom (Survival) checks to track your favored enemies, as well as on Intelligence checks to recall information about them.
When you gain this feature, you also learn one language of your choice that is spoken by your favored enemies, if they speak one at all.

You choose one additional favored enemy, as well as an associated language, at 6th and 14th level. As you gain levels, your choices should reflect the types of monsters you have encountered on your adventures.

name: 自然探索者（2种地形）
desc: 你对一种自然环境特别熟悉，善于在这种区域旅行和生存。选择一种偏好地形：极地、海岸、沙漠、森林、草原、山地或沼泽。当你进行与偏好地形相关的智力或感知检定时，如果你熟练于所使用的技能，你的熟练加值翻倍。
在偏好地形中旅行一小时或更长时间时，你获得以下好处：
- 困难地形不会减慢你团队的移动速度。
- 除非通过魔法手段，否则你的团队不会迷路。
- 即使你在旅行时忙于其他活动（如搜寻食物、导航或追踪），你也能保持对危险的警觉。
- 如果你独自旅行，你可以以正常速度隐秘移动。
- 当你搜寻食物时，你找到的食物是正常数量的两倍。
- 在追踪其他生物时，你还能得知它们的准确数量、体型以及它们经过该区域的时间。
在6级和10级时，你可以选择额外的偏好地形类型。
desc_en: You are particularly familiar with one type of natural environment and are adept at traveling and surviving in such regions. Choose one type of favored terrain: arctic, coast, desert, forest, grassland, mountain, or swamp. When you make an Intelligence or Wisdom check related to your favored terrain, your proficiency bonus is doubled if you are using a skill that you're proficient in.
While traveling for an hour or more in your favored terrain, you gain the following benefits:
- Difficult terrain doesn't slow your group's travel.
- Your group can't become lost except by magical means.
- Even when you are engaged in another activity while traveling (such as foraging, navigating, or tracking), you remain alert to danger.
- If you are traveling alone, you can move stealthily at a normal pace.
- When you forage, you find twice as much food as you normally would.
- While tracking other creatures, you also learn their exact number, their sizes, and how long ago they passed through the area.
You choose additional favored terrain types at 6th and 10th level.

name: 游侠范型特性
desc: 在3级时，你选择一个你努力模仿的范型，如猎人。你的选择在3级时赋予你特性，并在7级、11级和15级时再次赋予你特性。
desc_en: At 3rd level, you choose an archetype that you strive to emulate, such as the Hunter. Your choice grants you features at 3rd level and again at 7th, 11th, and 15th level.

name: 防御战术
desc: 在7级时，你获得以下特性之一（自选）。
逃脱群体
多重攻击防御
钢铁意志
desc_en: At 7th level, you gain one of the following features of your choice.
Escape the Horde
Multiattack Defense
Steel Will

name: 防御战术：逃离群敌
desc: 针对你的借机攻击具有劣势。
desc_en: Opportunity attacks against you are made with disadvantage.

name: 防御战术：多重攻击防御
desc: 当一个生物以攻击命中你时，你在该回合剩余时间内对该生物所有后续攻击的AC获得+4加值。
desc_en: When a creature hits you with an attack, you gain a +4 bonus to AC against all subsequent attacks made by that creature for the rest of the turn.

name: 防御战术：钢铁意志
desc: 你在对抗被恐惧状态的豁免检定上具有优势。
desc_en: You have advantage on saving throws against being frightened.

name: 属性值提升
desc: 当你达到4级、8级、12级、16级和19级时，你可以选择一个能力值提升2点，或选择两个能力值各提升1点。通常情况下，你不能使用此特性将能力值提升到20以上。
desc_en: When you reach 4th level, and again at 8th, 12th, 16th, and 19th level, you can increase one ability score of your choice by 2, or you can increase two ability scores of your choice by 1. As normal, you can't increase an ability score above 20 using this feature.

name: 大地行者
desc: 从8级开始，穿越非魔法困难地形不再额外消耗你的移动力。你还可以穿过非魔法植物而不被它们减慢速度，也不会受到它们荆棘、尖刺或类似危害的伤害。
此外，你在对抗被魔法创造或操控以阻碍移动的植物（如纠缠术创造的植物）的豁免检定上具有优势。
desc_en: Starting at 8th level, moving through nonmagical difficult terrain costs you no extra movement. You can also pass through nonmagical plants without being slowed by them and without taking damage from them if they have thorns, spines, or a similar hazard.
In addition, you have advantage on saving throws against plants that are magically created or manipulated to impede movement, such those created by the entangle spell.

name: 自然探索者（3种地形）
desc: 你对一种自然环境特别熟悉，善于在这种区域旅行和生存。选择一种偏好地形：极地、海岸、沙漠、森林、草原、山地或沼泽。当你进行与偏好地形相关的智力或感知检定时，如果你熟练于所使用的技能，你的熟练加值翻倍。
在偏好地形中旅行一小时或更长时间时，你获得以下好处：
- 困难地形不会减慢你团队的移动速度。
- 除非通过魔法手段，否则你的团队不会迷路。
- 即使你在旅行时忙于其他活动（如搜寻食物、导航或追踪），你也能保持对危险的警觉。
- 如果你独自旅行，你可以以正常速度隐秘移动。
- 当你搜寻食物时，你找到的食物是正常数量的两倍。
- 在追踪其他生物时，你还能得知它们的准确数量、体型以及它们经过该区域的时间。
在6级和10级时，你可以选择额外的偏好地形类型。
desc_en: You are particularly familiar with one type of natural environment and are adept at traveling and surviving in such regions. Choose one type of favored terrain: arctic, coast, desert, forest, grassland, mountain, or swamp. When you make an Intelligence or Wisdom check related to your favored terrain, your proficiency bonus is doubled if you are using a skill that you're proficient in.
While traveling for an hour or more in your favored terrain, you gain the following benefits:
- Difficult terrain doesn't slow your group's travel.
- Your group can't become lost except by magical means.
- Even when you are engaged in another activity while traveling (such as foraging, navigating, or tracking), you remain alert to danger.
- If you are traveling alone, you can move stealthily at a normal pace.
- When you forage, you find twice as much food as you normally would.
- While tracking other creatures, you also learn their exact number, their sizes, and how long ago they passed through the area.
You choose additional favored terrain types at 6th and 10th level.

name: 躲藏视野
desc: 从10级开始，你可以花费1分钟为自己制作伪装。你必须能够接触到新鲜的泥土、植物、烟灰和其他天然材料来制作你的伪装。
一旦你这样伪装好，你可以通过紧贴一个至少和你一样高和宽的固体表面（如树或墙）来尝试隐藏。只要你保持不动或不执行动作，你在敏捷（隐匿）检定上获得+10加值。一旦你移动或执行动作或反应，你必须重新伪装才能获得此好处。
desc_en: Starting at 10th level, you can spend 1 minute creating camouflage for yourself. You must have access to fresh mud, dirt, plants, soot, and other naturally occurring materials with which to create your camouflage.

Once you are camouflaged in this way, you can try to hide by pressing yourself up against a solid surface, such as a tree or wall, that is at least as tall and wide as you are. You gain a +10 bonus to Dexterity (Stealth) checks as long as you remain there without moving or taking actions. Once you move or take an action or a reaction, you must camouflage yourself again to gain this benefit.

name: 游侠范型特性
desc: 在3级时，你选择一个你努力模仿的范型，如猎人。你的选择在3级时赋予你特性，并在7级、11级和15级时再次赋予你特性。
desc_en: At 3rd level, you choose an archetype that you strive to emulate, such as the Hunter. Your choice grants you features at 3rd level and again at 7th, 11th, and 15th level.

name: 多重攻击
desc: 在11级时，你获得以下特性之一（自选）。
箭雨
旋风斩
desc_en: At 11th level, you gain one of the following features of your choice.
Volley
Whirlwind Attack

name: 多重攻击：齐射
desc: 你可以使用动作对你武器射程内你能看到的一个点周围10尺内的任意数量生物进行远程攻击。你需要为每个目标准备弹药，如常，并为每个目标单独进行攻击检定。
desc_en: You can use your action to make a ranged attack against any number of creatures within 10 feet of a point you can see within your weapon's range. You must have ammunition for each target, as normal, and you make a separate attack roll for each target.

name: 多重攻击：旋风攻击
desc: 你可以使用动作对你周围5尺内的任意数量生物进行近战攻击，为每个目标单独进行攻击检定。
desc_en: You can use your action to make a melee attack against any number of creatures within 5 feet of you, with a separate attack roll for each target.

name: 属性值提升
desc: 当你达到4级、8级、12级、16级和19级时，你可以选择一个能力值提升2点，或选择两个能力值各提升1点。通常情况下，你不能使用此特性将能力值提升到20以上。
desc_en: When you reach 4th level, and again at 8th, 12th, 16th, and 19th level, you can increase one ability score of your choice by 2, or you can increase two ability scores of your choice by 1. As normal, you can't increase an ability score above 20 using this feature.

desc: 从1级开始，你对某种特定类型的敌人拥有丰富的经验，研究、追踪、狩猎，甚至与它们交谈。
选择一种宿敌类型：异怪、野兽、天界生物、构装生物、龙、元素生物、精类、邪魔、巨人、怪兽、泥怪、植物或不死生物。或者，你可以选择两种类人生物种族（如豺狼人和兽人）作为宿敌。
你在追踪宿敌的感知（求生）检定以及回忆关于它们的信息的智力检定上具有优势。
当你获得此特性时，如果宿敌会说某种语言，你还可以学会一种由宿敌说的自选语言。
在6级和14级时，你分别选择一种额外的宿敌以及相关的语言。随着你获得等级，你的选择应该反映你在冒险中遇到的怪物类型。
desc_en: Beginning at 1st level, you have significant experience studying, tracking, hunting, and even talking to a certain type of enemy.

Choose a type of favored enemy: aberrations, beasts, celestials, constructs, dragons, elementals, fey, fiends, giants, monstrosities, oozes, plants, or undead. Alternatively, you can select two races of humanoid (such as gnolls and orcs) as favored enemies.
You have advantage on Wisdom (Survival) checks to track your favored enemies, as well as on Intelligence checks to recall information about them.
When you gain this feature, you also learn one language of your choice that is spoken by your favored enemies, if they speak one at all.

You choose one additional favored enemy, as well as an associated language, at 6th and 14th level. As you gain levels, your choices should reflect the types of monsters you have encountered on your adventures.

name: 消失
desc: 从14级开始，你可以在你的回合使用附赠动作进行躲藏动作。此外，除非你愿意留下痕迹，否则你无法被非魔法手段追踪。
desc_en: Starting at 14th level, you can use the Hide action as a bonus action on your turn. Also, you can't be tracked by nonmagical means, unless you choose to leave a trail.

name: 游侠范型特性
desc: 在3级时，你选择一个你努力模仿的范型，如猎人。你的选择在3级时赋予你特性，并在7级、11级和15级时再次赋予你特性。
desc_en: At 3rd level, you choose an archetype that you strive to emulate, such as the Hunter. Your choice grants you features at 3rd level and again at 7th, 11th, and 15th level.

name: 超凡猎手防御
desc: 在15级时，你获得以下特性之一（自选）。
闪避
逆流而立
不可思议闪避

item.name: Superior Hunter's Defense: Stand Against the Tide

desc_en: At 15th level, you gain one of the following features of your choice.
Evasion
Stand Against the Tide
Uncanny Dodge

name: 卓越猎手防御：闪避
desc: 当你受到允许你进行敏捷豁免检定以只承受一半伤害的效应影响时（如红龙的火焰吐息或闪电术），如果你成功通过豁免检定，则不受伤害，如果失败则只承受一半伤害。
desc_en: When you are subjected to an effect, such as a red dragon's fiery breath or a lightning bolt spell, that allows you to make a Dexterity saving throw to take only half damage, you instead take no damage if you succeed on the saving throw, and only half damage if you fail.

name: 卓越猎手防御：逆流而立
desc: 当一个敌对生物对你的近战攻击落空时，你可以使用反应迫使该生物对你选择的另一个生物（不能是它自己）重复同样的攻击。
desc_en: When a hostile creature misses you with a melee attack, you can use your reaction to force that creature to repeat the same attack against another creature (other than itself) of your choice.
name_en: Superior Hunter's Defense: Stand Against the Tide

name: 卓越猎手防御：直觉闪避
desc: 当一个你能看到的攻击者命中你时，你可以使用反应将这次攻击对你造成的伤害减半。
desc_en: When an attacker that you can see hits you with an attack, you can use your reaction to halve the attack's damage against you.

name: 属性值提升
desc: 当你达到4级、8级、12级、16级和19级时，你可以选择一个能力值提升2点，或选择两个能力值各提升1点。通常情况下，你不能使用此特性将能力值提升到20以上。
desc_en: When you reach 4th level, and again at 8th, 12th, 16th, and 19th level, you can increase one ability score of your choice by 2, or you can increase two ability scores of your choice by 1. As normal, you can't increase an ability score above 20 using this feature.

name: 野兽感官
desc: 在18级时，你获得了超自然的感官，帮助你与你无法看到的生物战斗。当你攻击一个你看不到的生物时，你看不见它不会对你的攻击检定造成劣势。
你也能感知到30尺内任何隐形生物的位置，前提是该生物没有对你躲藏且你没有目盲或耳聋。
desc_en: At 18th level, you gain preternatural senses that help you fight creatures you can't see. When you attack a creature you can't see, your inability to see it doesn't impose disadvantage on your attack rolls against it.
You are also aware of the location of any invisible creature within 30 feet of you, provided that the creature isn't hidden from you and you aren't blinded or deafened.

name: 属性值提升
desc: 当你达到4级、8级、12级、16级和19级时，你可以选择一个能力值提升2点，或选择两个能力值各提升1点。通常情况下，你不能使用此特性将能力值提升到20以上。
desc_en: When you reach 4th level, and again at 8th, 12th, 16th, and 19th level, you can increase one ability score of your choice by 2, or you can increase two ability scores of your choice by 1. As normal, you can't increase an ability score above 20 using this feature.

name: 天敌杀手
desc: 在20级时，你成为了你敌人的无与伦比的猎手。在你的每个回合中一次，你可以将感知调整值加到你针对一个宿敌的攻击检定或伤害检定上。你可以在掷骰之前或之后选择使用此特性，但在掷骰效果应用之前。
desc_en: At 20th level, you become an unparalleled hunter of your enemies. Once on each of your turns, you can add your Wisdom modifier to the attack roll or the damage roll of an attack you make against one of your favored enemies. You can choose to use this feature before or after the roll, but before any effects of the roll are applied.

name: 专精
desc: 在1级时，选择你的两项技能熟练，或一项技能熟练和盗贼工具的熟练。对于任何使用所选熟练的属性检定，你的熟练加值翻倍。
在6级时，你可以再选择两项你的熟练（技能或盗贼工具）获得此好处。
desc_en: At 1st level, choose two of your skill proficiencies, or one of your skill proficiencies and your proficiency with thieves' tools. Your proficiency bonus is doubled for any ability check you make that uses either of the chosen proficiencies.
At 6th level, you can choose two more of your proficiencies (in skills or with thieves' tools) to gain this benefit

name: 偷袭
desc: 从1级开始，你知道如何巧妙地打击并利用敌人的分心。在你的每个回合一次，如果你对攻击检定具有优势，你可以对命中的一名生物额外造成1d6伤害。该攻击必须使用精巧武器或远程武器。
如果目标的另一个敌人在它5尺内，该敌人没有失能，且你的攻击检定没有劣势，则你不需要具有优势。
额外伤害的数量随着你在此职业获得等级而增加，如游荡者表格中的偷袭列所示。
desc_en: Beginning at 1st level, you know how to strike subtly and exploit a foe's distraction. Once per turn, you can deal an extra 1d6 damage to one creature you hit with an attack if you have advantage on the attack roll. The attack must use a finesse or a ranged weapon.
You don't need advantage on the attack roll if another enemy of the target is within 5 feet of it, that enemy isn't incapacitated, and you don't have disadvantage on the attack roll.
The amount of the extra damage increases as you gain levels in this class, as shown in the Sneak Attack column of the Rogue table.

name: 盗贼黑话
desc: 在你的游荡者训练中，你学会了盗贼黑话，一种方言、行话和暗号的秘密混合，让你可以在看似正常的对话中隐藏信息。只有另一个懂得盗贼黑话的生物才能理解这些信息。传达此类信息所需的时间是清楚表达同样想法的四倍。
此外，你理解一套秘密的标记和符号，用于传达简短、简单的信息，例如某个区域是否危险或属于盗贼公会领地，附近是否有战利品，或者某个区域的人是否容易下手或为逃亡盗贼提供安全屋。
desc_en: During your rogue training you learned thieves' cant, a secret mix of dialect, jargon, and code that allows you to hide messages in seemingly normal conversation. Only another creature that knows thieves' cant understands such messages. It takes four times longer to convey such a message than it does to speak the same idea plainly.

In addition, you understand a set of secret signs and symbols used to convey short, simple messages, such as whether an area is dangerous or the territory of a thieves' guild, whether loot is nearby, or whether the people in an area are easy marks or will provide a safe house for thieves on the run.

name: 狡诈行动
desc: 从2级开始，你敏捷的思维和灵活性让你能够快速移动和行动。在你的每个战斗回合中，你可以使用附赠动作。该动作只能用于进行疾行、撤离或躲藏动作。
desc_en: Starting at 2nd level, your quick thinking and agility allow you to move and act quickly. You can take a bonus action on each of your turns in combat. This action can be used only to take the Dash, Disengage, or Hide action.

name: 游荡者范型
desc: 在3级时，你选择一个范型，在运用你的游荡者能力时效仿它，例如盗贼。其他范型可在原始资料中找到。你的范型选择在3级以及9、13、17级时赋予你特性。
desc_en: At 3rd level, you choose an archetype that you emulate in the exercise of your rogue abilities, such as Thief. Additional archetypes are available in the original source material. Your archetype choice grants you features at 3rd level and then again at 9th, 13th, and 17th level.

name: 快手
desc: 从3级开始，你可以使用你狡诈动作提供的附赠动作来进行敏捷（巧手）检定，使用你的盗贼工具来解除陷阱或开锁，或使用物品动作。
desc_en: Starting at 3rd level, you can use the bonus action granted by your Cunning Action to make a Dexterity (Sleight of Hand) check, use your thieves' tools to disarm a trap or open a lock, or take the Use an Object action.

name: 飞檐走壁
desc: 当你在3级选择此范型时，你获得了比正常更快的攀爬能力；攀爬不再花费你额外的移动力。
此外，当你进行奔跑跳远时，你跳过的距离增加等于你敏捷调整值的尺数。
desc_en: When you choose this archetype at 3rd level, you gain the ability to climb faster than normal; climbing no longer costs you extra movement.
In addition, when you make a running jump, the distance you cover increases by a number of feet equal to your Dexterity modifier.

name: 属性值提升
desc: 当你达到4级，以及8、10、12、16、19级时，你可以将一项自选属性值提升2点，或者将两项自选属性值各提升1点。正常而言，你不能通过此特性将属性值提升到20以上。
desc_en: When you reach 4th level, and again at 8th, 10th, 12th, 16th, and 19th level, you can increase one ability score of your choice by 2, or you can increase two ability scores of your choice by 1. As normal, you can't increase an ability score above 20 using this feature.

name: 直觉闪避
desc: 从5级开始，当你能看到的一个攻击者用攻击命中你时，你可以使用反应将该攻击对你造成的伤害减半。
desc_en: Starting at 5th level, when an attacker that you can see hits you with an attack, you can use your reaction to halve the attack's damage against you.

name: 专精
desc: 在1级时，选择你的两项技能熟练，或一项技能熟练和盗贼工具的熟练。对于任何使用所选熟练的属性检定，你的熟练加值翻倍。
在6级时，你可以再选择两项你的熟练（技能或盗贼工具）获得此好处。
desc_en: At 1st level, choose two of your skill proficiencies, or one of your skill proficiencies and your proficiency with thieves' tools. Your proficiency bonus is doubled for any ability check you make that uses either of the chosen proficiencies.
At 6th level, you can choose two more of your proficiencies (in skills or with thieves' tools) to gain this benefit

name: 闪避
desc: 从7级开始，你可以敏捷地闪躲某些区域效果，例如红龙的火焰吐息或冰风暴法术。当你受到一个允许你进行敏捷豁免检定以只受一半伤害的效果影响时，如果你成功通过豁免检定，你改为不受伤害，如果失败则只受一半伤害。
desc_en: Beginning at 7th level, you can nimbly dodge out of the way of certain area effects, such as a red dragon's fiery breath or an ice storm spell. When you are subjected to an effect that allows you to make a Dexterity saving throw to take only half damage, you instead take no damage if you succeed on the saving throw, and only half damage if you fail.

name: 属性值提升
desc: 当你达到4级，以及8、10、12、16、19级时，你可以将一项自选属性值提升2点，或者将两项自选属性值各提升1点。正常而言，你不能通过此特性将属性值提升到20以上。
desc_en: When you reach 4th level, and again at 8th, 10th, 12th, 16th, and 19th level, you can increase one ability score of your choice by 2, or you can increase two ability scores of your choice by 1. As normal, you can't increase an ability score above 20 using this feature.

name: 游荡者范型特性
desc: 在3级时，你选择一个范型，在运用你的游荡者能力时效仿它，例如盗贼。其他范型可在原始资料中找到。你的范型选择在3级以及9、13、17级时赋予你特性。
desc_en: At 3rd level, you choose an archetype that you emulate in the exercise of your rogue abilities, such as Thief. Additional archetypes are available in the original source material. Your archetype choice grants you features at 3rd level and then again at 9th, 13th, and 17th level.

name: 至高潜行
desc: 从9级开始，如果你在同一回合移动不超过你速度的一半，你在敏捷（隐匿）检定上具有优势。
desc_en: Starting at 9th level, you have advantage on a Dexterity (Stealth) check if you move no more than half your speed on the same turn.

name: 属性值提升
desc: 当你达到4级，以及8、10、12、16、19级时，你可以将一项自选属性值提升2点，或者将两项自选属性值各提升1点。正常而言，你不能通过此特性将属性值提升到20以上。
desc_en: When you reach 4th level, and again at 8th, 10th, 12th, 16th, and 19th level, you can increase one ability score of your choice by 2, or you can increase two ability scores of your choice by 1. As normal, you can't increase an ability score above 20 using this feature.

name: 可靠才能
desc: 到11级时，你已经将所选技能磨练到接近完美的程度。每当你进行可以让你加熟练加值的属性检定时，你可以将d20掷出9或更低视为10。
desc_en: By 11th level, you have refined your chosen skills until they approach perfection. Whenever you make an ability check that lets you add your proficiency bonus, you can treat a d20 roll of 9 or lower as a 10.

name: 属性值提升
desc: 当你达到4级，以及8、10、12、16、19级时，你可以将一项自选属性值提升2点，或者将两项自选属性值各提升1点。正常而言，你不能通过此特性将属性值提升到20以上。
desc_en: When you reach 4th level, and again at 8th, 10th, 12th, 16th, and 19th level, you can increase one ability score of your choice by 2, or you can increase two ability scores of your choice by 1. As normal, you can't increase an ability score above 20 using this feature.

desc: 在3级时，你选择一个范型，在运用你的游荡者能力时效仿它，例如盗贼。其他范型可在原始资料中找到。你的范型选择在3级以及9、13、17级时赋予你特性。
desc_en: At 3rd level, you choose an archetype that you emulate in the exercise of your rogue abilities, such as Thief. Additional archetypes are available in the original source material. Your archetype choice grants you features at 3rd level and then again at 9th, 13th, and 17th level.

name: 使用魔法装置
desc: 到13级时，你已经充分了解了魔法的运作原理，即使物品不是为你准备的，你也可以即兴使用它们。你忽略使用魔法物品的所有职业、种族和等级要求。
desc_en: By 13th level, you have learned enough about the workings of magic that you can improvise the use of items even when they are not intended for you. You ignore all class, race, and level requirements on the use of magic items.

name: 盲视
desc: 从14级开始，如果你能听到，你就能感知到10尺内任何隐藏或隐形生物的位置。
desc_en: Starting at 14th level, if you are able to hear, you are aware of the location of any hidden or invisible creature within 10 feet of you.

name: 滑溜心智
desc: 到15级时，你获得了更强的精神力量。你获得感知豁免的熟练。
desc_en: By 15th level, you have acquired greater mental strength. You gain proficiency in Wisdom saving throws.

name: 属性值提升
desc: 当你达到4级，以及8、10、12、16、19级时，你可以将一项自选属性值提升2点，或者将两项自选属性值各提升1点。正常而言，你不能通过此特性将属性值提升到20以上。
desc_en: When you reach 4th level, and again at 8th, 10th, 12th, 16th, and 19th level, you can increase one ability score of your choice by 2, or you can increase two ability scores of your choice by 1. As normal, you can't increase an ability score above 20 using this feature.

desc: 在3级时，你选择一个范型，在运用你的游荡者能力时效仿它，例如盗贼。其他范型可在原始资料中找到。你的范型选择在3级以及9、13、17级时赋予你特性。
desc_en: At 3rd level, you choose an archetype that you emulate in the exercise of your rogue abilities, such as Thief. Additional archetypes are available in the original source material. Your archetype choice grants you features at 3rd level and then again at 9th, 13th, and 17th level.

name: 盗贼反射
desc: 当你达到17级时，你已经变得擅长设伏和快速逃离危险。在任何战斗的第一轮，你可以进行两个回合。你在你的正常先攻进行第一个回合，在你的先攻减10进行第二个回合。当你被突袭时不能使用此特性。
desc_en: When you reach 17th level, you have become adept at laying ambushes and quickly escaping danger. You can take two turns during the first round of any combat. You take your first turn at your normal initiative and your second turn at your initiative minus 10. You can't use this feature when you are surprised.

name: 难捉摸
desc: 从18级开始，你如此难以捉摸，以至于攻击者很少能占你上风。当你没有失能时，任何攻击检定对你都没有优势。
desc_en: Beginning at 18th level, you are so evasive that attackers rarely gain the upper hand against you. No attack roll has advantage against you while you aren't incapacitated.

name: 属性值提升
desc: 当你达到4级，以及8、10、12、16、19级时，你可以将一项自选属性值提升2点，或者将两项自选属性值各提升1点。正常而言，你不能通过此特性将属性值提升到20以上。
desc_en: When you reach 4th level, and again at 8th, 10th, 12th, 16th, and 19th level, you can increase one ability score of your choice by 2, or you can increase two ability scores of your choice by 1. As normal, you can't increase an ability score above 20 using this feature.

name: 幸运一击
desc: 在20级时，你有一种不可思议的本事，总能在需要的时候成功。如果你的攻击未命中射程内的目标，你可以将该未命中转变为命中。或者，如果你在一次属性检定中失败，你可以将d20掷出视为20。
一旦你使用此特性，你必须完成短休或长休后才能再次使用。
desc_en: At 20th level, you have an uncanny knack for succeeding when you need to. If your attack misses a target within range, you can turn the miss into a hit. Alternatively, if you fail an ability check, you can treat the d20 roll as a 20.
Once you use this feature, you can't use it again until you finish a short or long rest.

name: 施法：术士
desc: 你过去经历的某个事件，或你父母或祖先生命中的某个事件，在你身上留下了不可磨灭的印记，赋予你奥术魔法。无论其来源如何，这股魔法源泉为你的法术提供能量。
desc_en: An event in your past, or in the life of a parent or ancestor, left an indelible mark on you, infusing you with arcane magic. This font of magic, whatever its origin, fuels your spells.

name: 术士起源
desc: 选择一个术士起源，描述你天生魔法力量的来源，如龙族血脉。
你的选择在你1级选择它时赋予你特性，并在6级、14级和18级时再次赋予你特性。
desc_en: Choose a sorcerous origin, which describes the source of your innate magical power, such as Draconic Bloodline.
Your choice grants you features when you choose it at 1st level and again at 6th, 14th, and 18th level.

name: 龙族祖先
desc: 在1级时，你选择一种龙类作为你的祖先。每种龙类相关的伤害类型会被你之后获得的特性使用。
你可以说、读、写龙语。此外，每当你与龙互动时进行魅力检定时，如果熟练加值适用于该检定，你的熟练加值翻倍。
desc_en: At 1st level, you choose one type of dragon as your ancestor. The damage type associated with each dragon is used by features you gain later.
You can speak, read, and write Draconic. Additionally, whenever you make a Charisma check when interacting with dragons, your proficiency bonus is doubled if it applies to the check.

name: 龙族先祖：黑龙（强酸）
desc: 在1级时，你选择一种龙类作为你的祖先。每种龙类相关的伤害类型会被你之后获得的特性使用。
你可以说、读、写龙语。此外，每当你与龙互动时进行魅力检定时，如果熟练加值适用于该检定，你的熟练加值翻倍。

You can speak, read, and write Draconic. Additionally, whenever you make a Charisma check when interacting with dragons, your proficiency bonus is doubled if it applies to the check.

name: 龙族坚韧
desc: 当魔法流经你的身体时，它使你龙族祖先的身体特征显现出来。在1级时，你的生命值上限增加1，并且每当你在这个职业中获得等级时，生命值上限再增加1。
此外，你的部分皮肤被一层薄薄的龙鳞覆盖。当你未穿戴护甲时，你的AC等于13 + 你的敏捷调整值。
desc_en: As magic flows through your body, it causes physical traits of your dragon ancestors to emerge. At 1st level, your hit point maximum increases by 1 and increases by 1 again whenever you gain a level in this class.
Additionally, parts of your skin are covered by a thin sheen of dragon-like scales. When you aren't wearing armor, your AC equals 13 + your Dexterity modifier.

name: 魔法源泉
desc: 在2级时，你汲取你体内深处的魔法源泉。这个源泉以术法点表示，允许你创造各种魔法效果。
术法点
你有2个术法点，随着你达到更高等级，你会获得更多术法点，如术士表中的术法点列所示。你拥有的术法点数量不能超过你等级对应的表中所示。完成长休后，你恢复所有已消耗的术法点。
desc_en: At 2nd level, you tap into a deep wellspring of magic within yourself. This wellspring is represented by sorcery points, which allow you to create a variety of magical effects.
Sorcery Points

You have 2 sorcery points, and you gain more as you reach higher levels, as shown in the Sorcery Points column of the Sorcerer table. You can never have more sorcery points than shown on the table for your level. You regain all spent sorcery points when you finish a long rest.

name: 灵活施法：创造法术位
desc: 你可以在你的回合使用附赠动作将未消耗的术法点转化为一个法术位。创造法术位表显示了创造特定等级法术位的消耗。你可以创造的法术位最高为5级。
你用此特性创造的任何法术位在完成长休后消失。
desc_en: You can transform unexpended sorcery points into one spell slot as a bonus action on your turn. The Creating Spell Slots table shows the cost of creating a spell slot of a given level. You can create spell slots no higher in level than 5th.
Any spell slot you create with this feature vanishes when you finish a long rest.

name: 灵活施法：转换法术位
desc: 在你的回合使用附赠动作时，你可以消耗一个法术位并获得等于该法术位等级的术法点数量。
desc_en: As a bonus action on your turn, you can expend one spell slot and gain a number of sorcery points equal to the slot's level..

name: 超魔法
desc: 在3级时，你获得扭曲法术以适应你需求的能力。你获得以下超魔法选项中的两个（自选）。在10级和17级时，你分别获得另一个。
你在施放法术时只能对一个法术使用一个超魔法选项，除非另有说明。
desc_en: At 3rd level, you gain the ability to twist your spells to suit your needs. You gain two of the following Metamagic options of your choice. You gain another one at 10th and 17th level.
You can use only one Metamagic option on a spell when you cast it, unless otherwise noted.

name: 超魔法：谨慎法术
desc: 当你施放一个强迫其他生物进行豁免检定的法术时，你可以保护其中一些生物免受法术的全部力量。为此，你消耗1个术法点，并选择其中最多等于你魅力调整值数量的生物（至少一个）。被选择的生物在对抗该法术的豁免检定上自动成功。
desc_en: When you cast a spell that forces other creatures to make a saving throw, you can protect some of those creatures from the spell's full force. To do so, you spend 1 sorcery point and choose a number of those creatures up to your Charisma modifier (minimum of one creature). A chosen creature automatically succeeds on its saving throw against the spell.

name: 超魔法：远距法术
desc: 当你施放射程为5尺或更远的法术时，你可以消耗1个术法点使该法术的射程翻倍。
当你施放射程为接触的法术时，你可以消耗1个术法点使该法术的射程变为30尺。
desc_en: When you cast a spell that has a range of 5 feet or greater, you can spend 1 sorcery point to double the range of the spell.
When you cast a spell that has a range of touch, you can spend 1 sorcery point to make the range of the spell 30 feet.

name: 超魔法：强效法术
desc: 当你为法术掷伤害骰时，你可以消耗1个术法点重掷最多等于你魅力调整值数量的伤害骰（至少一个）。你必须使用新的掷骰结果。
即使你在施放该法术时已经使用了不同的超魔法选项，你也可以使用强效法术。
desc_en: When you roll damage for a spell, you can spend 1 sorcery point to reroll a number of the damage dice up to your Charisma modifier (minimum of one). You must use the new rolls.
You can use Empowered Spell even if you have already used a different Metamagic option during the casting of the spell.

name: 超魔法：延时法术
desc: 当你施放持续时间为1分钟或更长的法术时，你可以消耗1个术法点使其持续时间翻倍，最长持续时间为24小时。
desc_en: When you cast a spell that has a duration of 1 minute or longer, you can spend 1 sorcery point to double its duration, to a maximum duration of 24 hours.

name: 超魔法：升阶法术
desc: 当你施放一个强迫生物进行豁免检定以抵抗其效果的法术时，你可以消耗3个术法点使该法术的一个目标在对抗该法术的第一次豁免检定上处于劣势。
desc_en: When you cast a spell that forces a creature to make a saving throw to resist its effects, you can spend 3 sorcery points to give one target of the spell disadvantage on its first saving throw made against the spell.

name: 超魔法：迅捷法术
desc: 当你施放施法时间为1动作的法术时，你可以消耗2个术法点将该次施法的施法时间改为1附赠动作。
desc_en: When you cast a spell that has a casting time of 1 action, you can spend 2 sorcery points to change the casting time to 1 bonus action for this casting.

name: 超魔法：精妙法术
desc: 当你施放法术时，你可以消耗1个术法点来施放它而不需要任何姿势或语言成分。
desc_en: When you cast a spell, you can spend 1 sorcery point to cast it without any somatic or verbal components.

name: 超魔法：双生法术
desc: 当你施放只针对一个生物且射程不是自我的法术时，你可以消耗等于该法术等级的术法点数量来使射程内的第二个生物成为该法术的目标（如果该法术是戏法则消耗1个术法点）。
要符合条件，法术在其当前等级必须无法同时针对多个生物。例如，魔法飞弹和灼热射线不符合条件，但冷冻射线符合条件。
desc_en: When you cast a spell that targets only one creature and doesn't have a range of self, you can spend a number of sorcery points equal to the spell's level to target a second creature in range with the same spell (1 sorcery point if the spell is a cantrip).
To be eligible, a spell must be incapable of targeting more than one creature at the spell's current level. For example, magic missile and scorching ray aren't eligible, but ray of frost is.

name: 属性值提升
desc: 当你达到4级、8级、12级、16级和19级时，你可以选择一个能力值提升2点，或选择两个能力值各提升1点。通常情况下，你不能使用此特性将能力值提升到20以上。
desc_en: When you reach 4th level, and again at 8th, 12th, 16th, and 19th level, you can increase one ability score of your choice by 2, or you can increase two ability scores of your choice by 1. As normal, you can't increase an ability score above 20 using this feature.

name: 术士起源特性
desc: 选择一个术士起源，描述你天生魔法力量的来源，如龙族血脉。
你的选择在你1级选择它时赋予你特性，并在6级、14级和18级时再次赋予你特性。
desc_en: Choose a sorcerous origin, which describes the source of your innate magical power, such as Draconic Bloodline.
Your choice grants you features when you choose it at 1st level and again at 6th, 14th, and 18th level.

name: 元素亲和
desc: 从6级开始，当你施放一个造成与你龙族祖先相关类型伤害的法术时，你可以将魅力调整值加到该法术的一次伤害掷骰上。同时，你可以消耗1个术法点获得对该伤害类型的抗性，持续1小时。
desc_en: Starting at 6th level, when you cast a spell that deals damage of the type associated with your draconic ancestry, you can add your Charisma modifier to one damage roll of that spell. At the same time, you can spend 1 sorcery point to gain resistance to that damage type for 1 hour.

name: 属性值提升
desc: 当你达到4级、8级、12级、16级和19级时，你可以选择一个能力值提升2点，或选择两个能力值各提升1点。通常情况下，你不能使用此特性将能力值提升到20以上。
desc_en: When you reach 4th level, and again at 8th, 12th, 16th, and 19th level, you can increase one ability score of your choice by 2, or you can increase two ability scores of your choice by 1. As normal, you can't increase an ability score above 20 using this feature.

name: 超魔法
desc: 在3级时，你获得扭曲法术以适应你需求的能力。你获得以下超魔法选项中的两个（自选）。在10级和17级时，你分别获得另一个。
你在施放法术时只能对一个法术使用一个超魔法选项，除非另有说明。
desc_en: At 3rd level, you gain the ability to twist your spells to suit your needs. You gain two of the following Metamagic options of your choice. You gain another one at 10th and 17th level.
You can use only one Metamagic option on a spell when you cast it, unless otherwise noted.

name: 属性值提升
desc: 当你达到4级、8级、12级、16级和19级时，你可以选择一个能力值提升2点，或选择两个能力值各提升1点。通常情况下，你不能使用此特性将能力值提升到20以上。
desc_en: When you reach 4th level, and again at 8th, 12th, 16th, and 19th level, you can increase one ability score of your choice by 2, or you can increase two ability scores of your choice by 1. As normal, you can't increase an ability score above 20 using this feature.

name: 术士起源特性
desc: 选择一个术士起源，描述你天生魔法力量的来源，如龙族血脉。
你的选择在你1级选择它时赋予你特性，并在6级、14级和18级时再次赋予你特性。
desc_en: Choose a sorcerous origin, which describes the source of your innate magical power, such as Draconic Bloodline.
Your choice grants you features when you choose it at 1st level and again at 6th, 14th, and 18th level.

name: 龙翼
desc: 在14级时，你获得从背后伸出一对龙翼的能力，获得等于你当前速度的飞行速度。你可以在你的回合使用附赠动作创造这些翅膀。它们会一直持续到你使用附赠动作将其解散。
你不能在穿戴护甲时显现翅膀，除非护甲是为容纳它们而特制的，而没有为容纳你的翅膀而特制的衣服可能会在你显现翅膀时被毁坏。
desc_en: At 14th level, you gain the ability to sprout a pair of dragon wings from your back, gaining a flying speed equal to your current speed. You can create these wings as a bonus action on your turn. They last until you dismiss them as a bonus action on your turn.
You can't manifest your wings while wearing armor unless the armor is made to accommodate them, and clothing not made to accommodate your wings might be destroyed when you manifest them.

name: 属性值提升
desc: 当你达到4级、8级、12级、16级和19级时，你可以选择一个能力值提升2点，或选择两个能力值各提升1点。通常情况下，你不能使用此特性将能力值提升到20以上。
desc_en: When you reach 4th level, and again at 8th, 12th, 16th, and 19th level, you can increase one ability score of your choice by 2, or you can increase two ability scores of your choice by 1. As normal, you can't increase an ability score above 20 using this feature.

name: 超魔法
desc: 在3级时，你获得扭曲法术以适应你需求的能力。你获得以下超魔法选项中的两个（自选）。在10级和17级时，你分别获得另一个。
你在施放法术时只能对一个法术使用一个超魔法选项，除非另有说明。
desc_en: At 3rd level, you gain the ability to twist your spells to suit your needs. You gain two of the following Metamagic options of your choice. You gain another one at 10th and 17th level.
You can use only one Metamagic option on a spell when you cast it, unless otherwise noted.

name: 术士起源特性
desc: 选择一个术士起源，描述你天生魔法力量的来源，如龙族血脉。
你的选择在你1级选择它时赋予你特性，并在6级、14级和18级时再次赋予你特性。
desc_en: Choose a sorcerous origin, which describes the source of your innate magical power, such as Draconic Bloodline.
Your choice grants you features when you choose it at 1st level and again at 6th, 14th, and 18th level.

name: 龙族威严
desc: 从18级开始，你可以引导你龙族祖先的恐惧威严，使周围的人感到敬畏或恐惧。作为一个动作，你可以消耗5个术法点来汲取这种力量，并散发出60尺范围内的敬畏或恐惧光环（由你选择）。持续1分钟或直到你失去专注（如同你正在施放一个需要专注的法术），每个在该光环内开始其回合的敌对生物必须通过感知豁免检定，否则会被魅惑（如果你选择敬畏）或恐惧（如果你选择恐惧），直到光环结束。成功通过此豁免检定的生物在24小时内对你的光环免疫。
desc_en: Beginning at 18th level, you can channel the dread presence of your dragon ancestor, causing those around you to become awestruck or frightened. As an action, you can spend 5 sorcery points to draw on this power and exude an aura of awe or fear (your choice) to a distance of 60 feet. For 1 minute or until you lose your concentration (as if you were casting a concentration spell), each hostile creature that starts its turn in this aura must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or be charmed (if you chose awe) or frightened (if you chose fear) until the aura ends. A creature that succeeds on this saving throw is immune to your aura for 24 hours.

name: 属性值提升
desc: 当你达到4级、8级、12级、16级和19级时，你可以选择一个能力值提升2点，或选择两个能力值各提升1点。通常情况下，你不能使用此特性将能力值提升到20以上。
desc_en: When you reach 4th level, and again at 8th, 12th, 16th, and 19th level, you can increase one ability score of your choice by 2, or you can increase two ability scores of your choice by 1. As normal, you can't increase an ability score above 20 using this feature.

name: 术法复原
desc: 在20级时，每当你完成短休，你恢复4个已消耗的术法点。
desc_en: At 20th level, you regain 4 expended sorcery points whenever you finish a short rest.

name: 异界宗主
desc: 在1级时，你与你选择的异界存在达成契约，如邪魔。你的选择在1级时赋予你特性，并在6级、10级和14级时再次赋予你特性。
desc_en: At 1st level, you have struck a bargain with an otherworldly being of your choice, such as the Fiend. Your choice grants you features at 1st level and again at 6th, 10th, and 14th level.

name: 黑暗祝福
desc: 从1级开始，当你将一个敌对生物的生命值降至0时，你获得等于你的魅力调整值 + 你的邪术师等级（最少为1）的临时生命值。
desc_en: Starting at 1st level, when you reduce a hostile creature to 0 hit points, you gain temporary hit points equal to your Charisma modifier + your warlock level (minimum of 1).

name: 契约魔法
desc: 你的奥术研究和你的宗主赋予你的魔法使你能够熟练地施展法术。
desc_en: Your arcane research and the magic bestowed on you by your patron have given you facility with spells.

name: 魔能祈唤
desc: 在你研究神秘学识的过程中，你发掘出了魔能祈唤，这些禁忌知识碎片赋予你持久的魔法能力。
在2级时，你获得两个自选的魔能祈唤。你的祈唤选项在职业描述末尾详细说明。当你获得特定的邪术师等级时，你会获得额外的祈唤（自选），如邪术师表中的已知祈唤列所示。
此外，当你在这个职业中获得等级时，你可以选择你已经知道的一个祈唤，并将其替换为你可以在该等级学习的另一个祈唤。
